family: Collectible: Living Card Game (Fantasy Flight Games)
Game: Marvel Champions – The Card Game

boardgame: Warhammer Age of Sigmar: Warcry – Compendium
description:
Warcry: Compendium is your ultimate guide to assembling a Warcry warband to enter the depths of the Gnarlwood, accompanied by a powerful following of thralls, monsters, and allies. Within you will find a comprehensive list of rules for the second edition of Warcry, allowing you to command warriors from each of the Grand Alliances that dominate the Mortal Realms.

This 184-page softcover book is loaded with profiles and abilities for more than 40 existing warbands across all four Grand Alliances - the Sentinels of Order, Agents of Chaos, Bringers of Death, and Harbingers of Destruction - as well as the mighty allies, terrifying monsters, and bestial thralls that can be called upon to fight alongside them. These have all been updated for Warcry's second edition with balance adjustments, rules changes, and all-new Reactions to make your games even more dynamic and aggressive. It's everything you need to bring your existing collection into the Era of the Beast.

The warbands detailed in this book:

     Sentinels of Order: Cities of Sigmar, Daughters of Khaine, Khainite Shadowstalkers, Fyreslayers, Idoneth Deepkin, Kharadron Overlords, Lumineth Realm-lords, Seraphon, Sylvaneth, Thunderstrike Stormcast, Stormcast Eternals (Sacrosanct Chamber, Vanguard Auxiliary Chamber, and Warrior Chamber)
     Agents of Chaos: Blades of Khorne (Daemons and Bloodbound), Disciples of Tzeentch (Daemons and Arcanites), Maggotkin of Nurgle (Daemons and Rotbringers), Hedonites of Slaanesh (Daemons and Sybarites), Skaven, Slaves to Darkness, Iron Golems, Untamed Beasts, Corvus Cabal, Cypher Lords, The Unmade, Splintered Fang, Scions of the Flame, Spire Tyrants, Darkoath Savagers, and Tarantulos Brood
     Bringers of Death: Flesh-eater Courts, Nighthaunt, Ossiarch Bonereapers, and Soulblight Gravelords
     Harbingers of Destruction: Gloomspite Gitz, Gobbapalooza, Bonesplitterz, Ironjawz, Kruleboyz, and Ogor Mawtribes


—description from the publisher

This trivia game invites players to rediscover and reflect on facts about human rights and specifically the Universal Declaration of Human Rights ratified in 1948. It's an activism tool offering a pedagogic, instructive, challenging yet easy to play experience in a casual and confortable setting.

The name of the game derives from the french acronym "DUDH" (Déclaration Universelle des Droits de l'Homme) and could be translated in english as "UDH-what??"

Proceeds contribute to finance the actions initiated by Amnesty International.

Orda is an asymmetric chess variant that pits the Mongol horde against the kingdom.

The Mongol horde is based around knight movement, with pieces like the horse archer that move like a knight but capture like a bishop, or the Kheshig which moves and captures like a knight and king combined, while the kingdom has the same pieces and opening set up as the standard chess army.

Riffle has been located! Act now before they go back into hiding...

Riffle is the previously unannounced super-secret endgame behind Chip Theory's "Automaton of Shale" puzzle deck/pop-up adventure! Years in the making, this Gearloc only comes out of hiding in rare moments when enough puzzle solvers reach the end of the Automaton of Shale puzzle deck! You can read more about this promotion on our blog.

Riffle uses 10 Skill dice alongside a 52 card deck to deal (ha!) damage across the entire battlefield. Riffle is available only for 24-48 hours at a time! Don't miss your chance to grab this top secret character!

A crime with fatal consequences overtakes the magic world. Luckily, the elf of the main suspects turns to the order, which passes her concerns on to you.
Can you solve the mystery of the dark witches and wizards?

boardgame: Summoner Wars (Second Edition): Sand Goblins Faction Deck
description:
From deep within the desert wastes, the Sand Goblins ride into battle! Take the wheel with Krusk, who’s chaotic driving allows him to transport gangs of goblin riders across the battlefield. Soup up your rides with various vehicle upgrades, cruise into battle, and detonate them for maximum mayhem!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Summoner Wars (Second Edition): Obsidian Dwarves Faction Deck
description:
The Obsidian Dwarves are a mighty faction of warriors led by the explosively erratic Balzar. Balzar will become enraged through combat, scaling up and down in power throughout the fight. Watch him charge up and exhaust his boost meter to fuel the strongest abilities this faction has to offer. Equip your warriors with fiery weapons forged in hell and let the heat of battle determine their fate!

—description from the publisher

With your combined efforts, you were able to locate the three most powerful artifacts of the wizarding world in your school! However, your joy comes to an abrupt end when you realize that the dark wizards have already entered the school grounds. Will you manage in time to find a suitable hiding place for the artifacts and seal them up forever?

Mysterious meteors are crashing down across Justice City, each capable of turning everyday citizens into superheroes! Your goal is to seek out these meteor fragments, harness their power and become the most famous hero in Justice City.

Meteor Heroes is a loose area control game with push your luck elements at its core. Players will tackle petty crimes, Crisis' and major events across the six districts that cover the board. Fame is a fickle thing however and the public can easily favour a new hero if you aren't there to protect them.

On your turn you will assign your stamina cubes into move, action or trade on your character boards; you then take it in turns resolving these cubes until your stamina is exhausted. A turn can consist of moving to locations around the board, resolving crime tokens, crisis cards, events or claiming powers. Once your turn is over you will add more crime tokens to the board from the crime tower and then move the Police to their next location (hopefully arresting another player on the way).

Once a player has added their last fame token to the board or whoever has the most fame after the last event has been resolved will win and become the ultimate hero of Justice City!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Marvel: Crisis Protocol – Sentinel Prime MK4
description:
A Prime Sentinel leads its robotic brethren into the battles of Marvel: Crisis Protocol in the Sentinel Prime MK4 expansion.

A higher-level Sentinel that leads the hunt for mutants, the Sentinel Prime found in this pack features superior strength, weaponry, and protective hulls, making it even more of a threat. Even more dangerously, Prime Sentinels learn from every encounter with an enemy and make the data available to other Sentinels. Leading the new Sentinels Affiliation, the Sentinel Prime works particularly well with Mark IV Sentinels and Cassandra Nova. Finally, two Team Tactic cards further enhance its ability to lead the Sentinels and expand their sphere of influence.

Welcome to Zondance Academy. Here they will learn all the necessary movements for the correct mastery of Zonda Control. Let's not waste any more time, put on your tights and don't forget to warm up each muscle well... let's dance!

Goal
To be the best master of Zonda Control you must be very attentive and follow all the steps indicated by the instructor. When one or more players make a mistake, they will add an error. When a player accumulates 5 errors, the game ends and whoever has the least errors will be the winners.

Preparation
The deck, consisting of 18 cards, is shuffled and placed face down on the table. All players must stand around it.

How to play
On his turn, the active player must draw a card from the deck and place it in the center of the table face up, so that all players can see it. If there are more cards on the table, the new card must cover them so that only the last revealed card is visible. Then you must carry out all the STEPS that have come out so far in the correct order, or, in the event that an evaluation letter has come out, follow its instructions.


Bienvenidos a la academia Zondance. Aquí aprenderán todos los movimientos necesarios para el correcto dominio del Zonda Control. No perdamos más tiempo, pónganse las mallas y no olviden calentar bien cada musculo… ¡a bailar!

Objetivo
Para ser el mejor maestro de Zonda Control debes estar muy atento y seguir todos los pasos que indica el instructor. Cuando uno o varios jugadores se equivoquen sumaran un error. Cuando un jugador acumule 5 errores la partida finaliza y quien o quienes tengan menos errores serán los ganadores.

Preparación
Se mezcla el mazo, compuesto por 18 cartas y se coloca sobre la mesa boca abajo. Todos los jugadores deben estar de pie alrededor de este.

Cómo jugar
En su turno el jugador activo debe sacar una carta del mazo y colocarla en el centro de la mesa boca arriba, de modo que todos los jugadores puedan verla. De haber más cartas sobre la mesa, la nueva carta deberá cubrirlas de manera que solo se vea la última carta revelada. Acto seguido deberá realizar todos los PASOS que hayan salido hasta el momento en el orden correcto, o, en el caso de que haya salido una carta de evaluación, seguir las instrucciones de esta.

In a mystical land where landforms are brimming with arcane properties, sorcerers duel one another using the ground's magic, using wisdom the site imparts to deduce their opponents' clever machinations.

Arcane Grounds is a game about collecting magic powers from various locations in order to thwart your opponent in an elemental duel. Use this power to either support your core element or attack the opposing core. By looking at which deck a card came from, you can gather information on what that card could be. Team up with a friendly sorcerer to aid you in battle!

—description from the designer

The deadly Sentinels arrive in Marvel: Crisis Protocol to hunt mutants!

A new breed of powerful war machines, Mark IV Sentinels are designed to eradicate mutants with their electric and plasma blasts, catch-web cables, and extraordinary physical strength. The Sentinel MK4 expansion adds one relentless Mark IV Sentinel ready to reinforce the new Sentinels Affiliation to players’ squads. In addition to its built-in armaments and programming, this Sentinel is supplemented by three Team Tactic cards that give it even mores to work with its robotic brethren and the mummudrai Cassandra Nova.

boardgame: Marvel: Crisis Protocol – Red Skull & Hydra Troopers
description:
The Red Skull leads HYDRA in its quest for world domination in the Marvel: Crisis Protocol – Red Skull & Hydra Troopers expansion.

Johann Schmidt is a conniving villain whose evil deeds span generations. During this time, he has transformed HYDRA into a globe-spanning terrorist organization that cannot ever truly be destroyed, for "If a head is cut off, two more shall take its place."

The new version of the Red Skull in this pack introduces the HYDRA Affiliation to Marvel: Crisis Protocol while leading a group of HYDRA Troops ready to do his bidding. In addition to these miniatures and their abilities, this pack further enhances the HYDRA Affiliation with seven Team Tactic cards that give Red Skull and his subordinates even more ways to further their plans for world domination.

boardgame: Risk 2210 A.D.: Aerial Assault Command Deck – Reckoning
description: An additional 20 cards for the Aerial Command Deck, for Risk 2210AD.

boardgame: Magic: The Gathering – Throne of Eldraine
description:
Welcome to Eldraine—a storybook land of castles and cauldrons, of chivalrous knights and trickster faeries. But like the devious creatures and beguiling magic that lurk among the shadows, this world is not all that it seems. Join the five courts of the Realm on an epic adventure for honor and glory, or venture a darker path into the mysterious wilds. Which path will you choose?

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable
family: Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Beauty and the Beast
Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Hansel and Gretel
Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Jack and the Beanstalk
Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Little Red Riding Hood
Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Robin Hood
Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Sleeping Beauty
Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Snow White
Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: The Little Mermaid
Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: The Pied Piper of Hamelin
Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Three Billy Goats Gruff
Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Three Little Pigs
Theme: King Arthur / The Knights of the Round Table / Camelot

description:
The Game of Skate TCG is a fast paced competitive dice-battle card game.

If you've ever played a game of H.O.R.S.E. on a basketball court, then you already know how to win at The Game of Skate! Play skateboard trick cards and roll the dice to land them! Players take turns trying their best not crash and bail on their opponent's tricks at the risk of taking a letter! Spell out S.K.A.T.E. and you lose the game!

The Game of Skate is easy to learn but offers deep strategy and boundless opportunities for customized deck building.

Each Hero is built around a unique Skateboard archetype. Maxx, a Hammer-type Hero specializes in huge drops and maximum impact. Tawny is a Vert Hero who owns the skies with super-charged spin moves. Choose cards that sync with your Hero’s Abilities to unlock your Ultimate Banger!

Card Types

Trick types include Flip, Spin, Grind, and Grab. Most trick cards will be resolved, or Landed, by a roll of the dice. Action type cards are divided into Steeze and Stoppers, where Steeze cards will usually help, while Stoppers hinder your opponent. Location Cards are where all the magic happens. Activate your Local, Gnarly, and Heroic spots to gain an edge over your opponents!

—description from the designer

Your spaceship, the Daedalus, has crashed on the planet Xorakus! You must work together to explore this alien world, find resources, repair your ship, and escape with your lives.

The crew has many characters to choose from, each with their own special abilities and a unique set of base skills. You can customize your character by gaining cards from their improvement deck.

Explore or scout new territory by placing hexagon tiles from a variety of terrain categories. Then reveal the corresponding Encounter cards (Items, Enemies, Events, etc.) that could either help or hinder your efforts.
 Once each round, activate native Xorakians and other enemies with a card from the Movement deck. Track the Xorakian Body Count with the Status Display Dial, but be careful; as the kills begin to mount your ability to communicate with them will slip away.

You’ll have to stay on mission and gather resources like fuel, electronics, and machine parts, which are necessary to fix the damaged systems of your spaceship.

Once everything has been repaired the players must make it back onboard and blast off to win the game of Xorakus!

—description from the designer

Answer the Questions and follow the Trail on a fascinating journey to distilleries, whisky tastings, the occasional bar, a Burns Night party; and of course, enjoying the odd "wee dram" along the way.

This game is intended for those who enjoy the fine simple pleasures that can be gained from a good glass of whisky.

It will enhance your appreciation of whisky and provide a very enjoyable evening for 2-8 players.

—description from the back of the box

boardgame: Magic: The Gathering – Throne of Eldraine Planeswalker Deck: Oko, the Trickster
description:
This Magic: The Gathering Starter deck is ready to go. Battle a few times to understand how to play your deck, then open the 2 included booster packs to customize it.

Oko relies on guile and surprise to defeat his foes. Summon small, evasive creatures to chip away at your opponent's life total while you draw cards and build up your resources.

—description from publisher

Block Breaker -  A tactical game set in the Krimspace Universe for 2 players.

Fight with your space ships for the victory! On the one hand you have "Blocker" ships that are slow, but can capture the opponent's ships in a team effort. Also you have "Breaker" ships, fast but unprotected ships, that can "break through" to your base on the other side of the board.
If you can capture an opponent's "Breaker" by surrounding it or catch it in your "tractor beam" upon reaching your base, you can remodel it into a "Blocker" ship and use this to catch further "Breakers".

Win by successfully blocking the opponents "Breaker" or breaking through to your base when having 5 "Blocker" ships in play.

Pure strategy, with no chance elements.

The players take turns to roll and move. They start from Basel, Genf, Lugano or St. Gallen. On some spaces, depending on the color of the playing figure, events hinder or benefit the players. For each starting point (player color), there is a card with the applicable events.

The first to reach the central space (Verlagsanstalt Ringier & Co.) wins the game.

The game was published as a christmas supplement to the magazine "Ringiers Unterhaltungs-Blätter" Nr. 52/1937.

—user summary

A new group of gladiators enters the arena!

Get them in your starting five and look for new synergies.

These 5 new female gladiators are not nice. They've been hand-picked by the Ophidian Lords as the "house" favorites, and for good reason.

Requires the "Core Deck" of Ophidian Wars to play.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Magic: The Gathering – Core Set 2020 Planeswalker Deck: Vivien, Nature's Avenger
description:
Planeswalker Decks familiarize players who are interested in Magic with basic strategy, plus the games setting, characters, and mechanics of the latest set. Each deck comes with a foil Planeswalker card not found anywhere else.

Vivien is a friend to the wild beasts of every world she visits. Call larger and larger creatures to your side as the game goes on, and power them up with spells to make sure they dominate the battlefield.

Contents: 1 ready-to-play 60-card deck featuring a foil Planeswalker card, 1 Core Set 2020 booster pack, 1 strategy insert, 1 Magic reference guide, 1 MTG Arena code card, 1 tuck box

—description from publisher

A political strategy board game for 2 to 4 players where players take on the role of political leaders looking to acquire seats in different states to form a majority, climb on the development and culture tracker to build their political engine and use strategy or aggression cards to enhance their progress. The art work is inspired by George Orwell's famous book - Animal farm.

Game play:
1. Players pick 2 leader cards each and select any 1 leader that they will use to play throughout the game. Each leader has a unique ability that helps them in the game and some initial wealth that they start.

2. Turn order is defined by the leader card selected. On a players turn the player first collects 3 sheep tokens from the bank (these represent voters). The player then proceeds to play any 2 actions from the following:
Seat action: Player gives sheep token to take any seat in a state. Each seat within the state has a number mentioned on it that represents how many sheep tokens are required to acquire that seat. Upon doing so players can collect the benefits mentioned for the state.
Card action: Player may play a card from their hand
Tracker action: Player may spend 2 moolah tokens to move up on either development or culture tracker
Power action: Player may discard power tokens to remove an opponent from their state
State action: Player may use any one benefit of a state they have formed a majority in

Players form a majority by acquiring more than 50% of the seats in a state. Upon forming a majority, the player gets victory points equivalent to the total number of seats in that state.

There are also 3 trackers in the game - Development, Culture and State.
The development and culture tracker can be climbed by acquiring seats in a state that provides the development or culture benefit.
State tracker can be climbed by getting a seat in any new state.

The first player to reach level 5 on the trackers gets 4 victory points.

The game ends when any one condition is met:

     A player has reached 21/23/30 points in a 4/3/2 player game
     All states have a majority or are full


—description from the publisher

狐狸娶親 is inspired by Japanese folklore.

A naughty boy sneaks out on a monkey’s wedding day and bumps into Fox’s secret wedding.
The boy now remembers his mother’s warning: foxes will punish whoever interrupts their wedding.
He shivers with scare and tries to hide in the wedding parade.
In the distance, a raccoon dog falls in love with a beautiful bride.

In this game, players take the roles of human, fox, and raccoon dog. Try to find their teammates and acquire information through conversations within a limited time(3 rounds) and actions(peek, exchange) and complete their goals.

Humans try to rescue the little boy from the wedding parade. The raccoon dog tries to snatch the bride from the wedding. Foxes try to protect their bride and capture the little boy.

—description from the designer

Sidney's Quest is a worker placement board game about beating your friends to the cushiest job in the village.

Get ready, keep your resources under control and strive for Sidney's favor!

Sidney's Quest is played over 8 rounds. Each round you focus on a combination of actions to gather new experiences while being able to pay your bills.

You get points for every goal card you complete and lose points for the ones you don’t succeed with. The player with the most victory points becomes the new village elder.

Curling Dice!: UFO is a dexterity game where players flick dice onto a hanging, multi-level spaceship-shaped board.  Players initially take turns using an adjustable see-saw catapult to toss dice onto the hanging platforms.  There is then a round of flicking dice on the platforms.  Points are scored based on the location of dice on the platforms as well as from knocking over aliens.

boardgame: Cancelled On Scene: EMS Card Game
description: You already know how to play it. It's like that one game with the black and white cards... you know - the one for normal people. So slide your gloves on and get ready for a product that my mother described as "honestly concerning". Play it at the station, at the nurses desk while taking a break from playing poker, while you're dodging calls, or with your friends over drinks in what little off time you have. If you work in health care, fire, or EMS, you'll appreciate the reality behind the twisted jokes, and hopefully open a dialogue to talk about the darker aspects of the job with your peers. Through humor comes healing.

The train is traveling Eastward across a variable board to East Copperdowns.  Along the way, players invest in towns that payout when the train visits.  Players can choose to move the train rather than invest.  The train cannot reuse track it has already covered and moves persistently to the east.  Once the train reaches East Copperdowns, the player with the most investment cubes in her possession wins.

The game requires three players.  There are bot rules included for 1 or 2 player games. Game comes tightly packed in a small "mint" tin.

DEATH, SECRETS, ASSASSINS
This is a strategic, competitive game where you play as assassins trying to eliminate each other. Load up your hand, build up your bank, all the while keeping your secret identity safe, or you might find yourself joining the greats BEYOND THE GRAVE.

HOW TO PLAY?
Collect powerful cards, sacrifice them for money, then use that money to play cards that sabotage and eliminate your opponents! Also, uncover your enemies secret identities, then use bounties to get rid of them. Be warned, the game ends after the last card is drawn!

WHAT'S INCLUDED?
Hidden Marks includes 48 effect cards, 5 mark cards, 1 rulebook, and 2 promotional cards. Everything you need to learn and start playing the game!

WHO'S IT FOR?
Perfect for friends and family who like strategic, competitive games. Hidden Marks can be played casually or competitively, perfect for people just starting to play games or board game enthusiasts.

WHERE TO PLAY?
Great for game nights, parties, or casual gatherings. Add it into you game lineup for a fast, fun experience. Wherever there is a table, Hidden Marks can be played.

BACKSTORY
Hidden Marks was first drafted in 2019, and after 5+ years and thousands of games, we have developed it into a game that anyone can enjoy. We pride ourselves on accessibility and quality, creating games that are colorblind friendly, dyslexia friendly, poor-memory friendly, beginner friendly, while still adding features high level expert players will enjoy.

-description from publisher

boardgame: D.E.I.: Divide et Impera – Old London
description:
Welcome to Old London! The icy roads are more dangerous than ever and the Purebred decided to send out a sign to all those survivor bands who want their favour. Besides, the Purebred are tired of the Rebels' numerous attacks, and now, they want to clean up the problem from the root. So, after they build up a new operating base inside the remains of Big Ben, the Purebred won't hesitate to punish all the Factions who don't kneel to their power!

The Old London expansion set allows you to play with a new faction: the Purebred, the terrible Despots in the D.E.I. World. Players could use the Purebred in every D.E.I. game, except for the Citadel Expansion set. Also, this expansion introduces the Campaign mode, that consists of a linked set of Scenarios where you will face your opponents in a competition to bring down the Old London power base... the dreaded Purebred. The Campaign scenarios introduce changes to the Base game rules and additional game elements, which can also be used in the following D.E.I. modes: The Thames, Vengeance Mode and Challenge & Alliance.

—description from the back of the box

boardgame: D.E.I.: Divide et Impera – White Death
description:
LUDUS MAGNUS STUDIO is deeply proud and grateful to present you the White Death Box!
This huge expansion for Divide Et Impera is the result of Backers and LMS team's efforts: it contains all the exclusive and additional materials, unlocked during the Kickstarter Campaign, thanks to over 2400 Backers.
In this large box, you'll find new available factions, a brand new market and the long awaited Automa, and the Solo mode, and much more material to bring longevity and variety in your future D.E.I. games.

This box adds:

     3 new additional factions (Wild, Psionics, Fauns).
     A new Market (Industrial Market).
     New mercenaries (Alexandra & Jukas, Sine Tempore cross-over).
     Weather cards.
     Automa mode with the Faun faction.


—description from the back of the box

boardgame: D.E.I.: Divide et Impera – Cash & Rad
description:
With Cash & Rad expansion, you can play your D.E.I. games with up to 6 players; in the box, you will also find two new factions: the smart Camdens (experienced traders), and the hazardous Rads (radioactive and lethal). You’ll use these factions with no restrictions in a D.E.I. game, with any number of players.
Last but not least, the new “Information Market” will be available for all your games: it will substitute one of the Outpost markets in D.E.I. base game.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: D.E.I.: Divide et Impera – The Citadel
description:
The Citadel is one of the powerful cores for the Purebreds: secrets that the population doesn’t need to know are in there. Is now the time to reveal all the truths? Freedom cannot wait! Are you ready to challenge the Purebreds’ Power? With The Citadel Expansion, you can play your D.E.I. games in a new mode: The Citadel! It also adds four alternative Leaders to the Base game Factions, plus one Leader and one Drone to the Purebreds faction (included in the Kickstarter Exclusive Old London Expansion).

—description from the publisher

boardgame: D.E.I.: Divide et Impera – Penny Boom
description:
The rebel and youngster mercenary, known as Penny Boom, is sneaking through Old London streets, offering her services to the highest bidder.
If a faction needs an advantage on other ones, with a good old explosion, she’s the one.
The girl, despite her young age, already has developed some remarkable skills in handling explosives. In her lab, that Purebreds with no success are looking for, Penny is capable to overproduce explosives and bombs she doesn’t want to sell. So, whoever wants to use her products has to hire Penny in the flesh to unleash her destructive thirst against other factions… even against the same Purebreds!

Penny Boom is a Mercenary unit, that can be integrated in any game of Divide et Impera.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: D.E.I.: Divide et Impera – Mad & Max
description:
The Mercenary duo called Mad and Max really do honour to their names!
Both are bold, daring and completely crazy ones, on their Snowbug (a heavy customized snow buggy) they run through Old London’s icy roads, offering their abilites to those Leaders, foolish enough to hire them!
No difference if they’ll be on scouting or demolition missions, nothing scares this duo: for booze and some food, they’ll do everything!
Mad & Max is a Mercenary unit, that can be integrated in any game of Divide et Impera.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Company of Heroes: Soviet Player Set
description:
SOVIET: Extremely mobile core infantry allows for immense early pressure and options for aggression.  While your units are versatile, plan ahead with what commanders and units you want to transition to, with many of your options being the strongest in the game for their cost. While your commanders are flexible, look to combine your core unit choices with a surprising commander combination to throw your opponent off guard.

The new Faction Player Sets now include all of the components to add an additional player, like command cubes, dice, infantry trays and more.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Company of Heroes: British Player Set
description:
BRITISH: Look to make up your lack of firepower by taking full advantage of your durability.  Focus on maintaining critical areas and slowly build up your forces to force your opponent into futile aggression.  Carefully select your commander and your heavy tanks as they offer a different style to meet your needs to defeat anything your opponent may field.

The new Faction Player Sets now include all of the components to add an additional player, like command cubes, dice, infantry trays and more.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Company of Heroes: OKW Player Set
description:
OKW: Plan the best locations for your forward spawning buildings, weighing the risk versus reward.  Your early infantry can deal with any situation even though you lack weapon teams.  Your expensive tier 3 units all have a huge impact when they hit the board, so just adapt your unit and commander choices to apply early pressure to buy you time to make a big play to seal the victory.

The new Faction Player Sets now include all of the components to add an additional player, like command cubes, dice, infantry trays and more.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Company of Heroes: USA Faction Player Set
description:
USA: Lean on your firepower and mobile weapon teams to focus early on critical points on the map. crushing your enemy where they are weakest.  Transition to arguably the most mobile, versatile and inexpensive core tanks to secure those points into the late game. Look to rely on your commanders to focus on your strengths to exploit your enemies weaknesses.

Note the USA player set is included in the Core Set but are available as an add-on.

—description from Kickstarter

boardgame: Company of Heroes: Wehrmacht Player Set
description:
WEHRMACHT: Overwhelm your opponents with your strength and powerful infantry, able to lockdown the map early.  Use your mobile light vehicles to adjust to your opponent and bring support to where you need it.  Your elite core tanks along with your commander call ins can destroy any pesky problems you may run into.

Note the Wehrmacht player set is included in the Core Set but are available as an add-on.

—description from Kickstarter

boardgame: Κυνήγι ερωτήσεων: Ιστορία – Συμπλήρωμα (Quiz Hunt: History – Supplement)
description: 384 supplementary questions to go alongside the base game

In "In Memory", you bought an old abandoned farm and with it a lot of pieces of the story of the couple who lived here. 
The goal of the game is to experience the story of those who lived here - to immerse yourself into their narrative.

The game features 3 roll and write games.
Common for each game is that you roll two dice and get a shape and a plant that you will fit into a custom grid.

During play, you'll be presented with the story through tiny glimpses of notes tucked beneath other notes, of pictures that you find, and tough flashbacks.

-description from designer

boardgame: Мандалорец: Грогу и лягушачьи бега (Mandalorian: Grogu and the Frog Race)
description:
Welcome to the planet Sorgan! While the Mandalorian teaches the villagers to protect their homes, baby Grogu is resting on the farm, amusing children and chasing for the frogs. You can play with him too!

Before starting the game every player receives 1 random goal card which shows what frogs will give them most points.Then they take 3 cards from the jump deck.

On your turn you play 1 jump card and move frogs that pictured on it, after that move Grogu twice. When Grogu moves in a place with frog - remove that frog from the board. Continue until only 4 frogs left.

Count your score using your goal card with frogs that is left on board when game ended.

boardgame: Magic: The Gathering – Core Set 2020 Planeswalker Deck: Chandra, Flame's Fury
description:
Planeswalker Decks familiarize players who are interested in Magic with basic strategy, plus the games setting, characters, and mechanics of the latest set. Each deck comes with a foil Planeswalker card not found anywhere else.

No matter who she's fighting, Chandra definitely has a favorite tool: fire! Blaze away your opponent's life total and swarm them with creatures before they can recover.

Contents: 1 ready-to-play 60-card deck featuring a foil Planeswalker card, 1 Core Set 2020 booster pack, 1 strategy insert, 1 Magic reference guide, 1 MTG Arena code card, 1 tuck box

boardgame: Charmed and Dangerous: Finding Gossamyr – Story Pack
description:
Story Packs add new content to your existing FOE decks, allowing you to revisit familiar adventures by adding brand new twists! This Finding Gossamyr Story Pack adds characters and adventures from the hit, all-ages Gossamyr Saga graphic novels. These cards will take you back to the Jade Fortress to face off against the sinister Skaythe Assassin Nerissa inside her unique Lair.

-description from publisher's website

1 vs. 100 Electronic Game - Where you take on a new mob every time!

Based on the Dutch TV game show Eén tegen 100, the game features a single player (the "1") competing against 100 other contestants (known as "the Mob"). Various (eg. US and Australian) electronic board game versions exist. To stay in the game, the player must answer trivia questions and get every one right. Wrong answers from the mob eliminate them from the game, driving up the cash prize for the player. If the player can eliminate all 100 members of the mob, which will also be stacked with surprise opponents, such as geniuses, valedictorians, grandmothers and other game show champs, they will go home eight the $1 million top prize. However, if the player gets on answer wrong, the game is over and the mob will split the player’s winnings up to that point Ana new contestants gets to take on the mob.

boardgame: Hunt a Killer: Empty Faces – The Mine
description:
We know you can solve a murder, but what happens when evil forces are at play? Experience Hunt A Killer in a completely new way! Try your hand at paranormal investigations with the full box set Empty Faces: The Mine. Fight against the supernatural forces of witchcraft and ancient evils to uncover the truth before it is too late.

Eerie occurrences troubling the local museum in Cooper’s Rock may be related to a devastating disaster in the town’s past. Sort through historical documents for proof of human wrong-doing, and fight against the supernatural forces threatening to overrun the town.

The Mine takes place over 5 episodes (that's 20-30 hours of gameplay total!)
Difficulty: 5/5 - Hard

Take on the investigations alone, as a couple, or use it as the centerpiece for a terrifying game night.

Immerse yourself in the supernatural world of Empty Faces. Discover clues, decode ciphers, and solve puzzles to unravel the mystery. It's like an escape room delivered to your door!

-description from publisher's website

boardgame: Charmed and Dangerous: Sharpened Crowns – Booster Pack
description:
Boost your Princesses and game challenges with the Sharpened Crowns 16 card booster pack for Charmed and Dangerous:  The Princess Adventure Game.

Base set required to use this booster.

boardgame: Гравити Фолз: Битва воспоминаний (Gravity Falls: Mabel Album)
description:
Returning home from Gravity Falls Mabel discovers that all photograps in her memorabilia album is mixed, and now she desperately needs your help.

Before the game split up in two even teams, shuffle all photographs and put them randomly in 4x4 grid. Shuffle all quest cards and reveal the top one.

On your turn you may flip one card, if the hero or symbol on the flipped card match with the one on the quest card you may go again, if not your turn is over.

First team to have all 7 heroes or symbols corresponding to the quest card, win that card.

Team with most quest completed wins the game.

Looking for additional Princesses or perhaps some alternate abilities with cool variation card art?  Then pick up this Princess Pack to expand and add on to your Charmed and Dangerous: The Sisters Grimm game! boardgame: Grim Dark Dungeon Master: Catacombs of the Necromancer
Star Wars: Legion – Din Djarin & Grogu Operative Expansion
description:
The Mandalorian and Grogu are ready to join the battles of Star Wars: Legion with the Din Djarin & Grogu Operative Expansion!

Din Djarin, also known as the Mandalorian, expands the game's mercenary forces with his skills as a bounty hunter. Joining him as a counterpart is Grogu, a foundling with a strong connection to the Force. Together, they form a potent duo that can also enhance your players' Rebel and Imperial armies. In addition to their latent abilities provided on two-unit cards, this expansion also includes four command cards that give them even more strategic options in battle. Finally, four upgrade cards give players the freedom to outfit Djarin with an array of additional equipment, including his Amban Rifle or a Baskar Spear.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Star Wars: Legion – IG-Series Assassin Droid Operative Expansion
description:
Two deadly assassin droids make their way into Star Wars: Legion in the IG-Series Assassin Droid Operative Expansion!

IG-11 is known for his ability to take down multiple targets in a whirlwind of blaster fire. Meanwhile, IG-88 is a rogue assassin droid with a reputation for ruthlessly bringing in his targets no matter the cost. This expansion puts both of these droids at players' disposal as mercenaries who will also side with Imperials or Rebels without any more qualms about their assignments. In addition to their built-in functionality, five Command Cards give them even more tactical options in battle while two upgrade cards give players the freedom to explore two distinct forms of programming with IG-11.

—description from the publisher

In Soiled you go through an entire year attempting to grow vegetables for points.

Seeds are gotten from a shared deck which is shuffled and 5 cards are dealt to each player.

After a first player is chosen, they can perform 3 actions to plant, water, and harvest plants into your garden basket.

Each card has a plant power that can help your garden grow, or attack your opponent to harm theirs.

Play passes to the left. after everyone has had a turn, the round is over. All players will grow all of the plants they can with a growth token. 1st player then passes left.

Use strategy and combos to your advantage to push your garden to its best and win the game!

Your boat, your command - The choices you make will decide the fate of your crew!

The North Atlantic in WWII. German U-boats are feverishly searching for Allied convoys. Far from the home ports, a merciless struggle for supplies for Great Britain and the Soviet Union breaks out. The first to lose their nerve here will disappear without a trace into the depths of the ocean.

The submarine simulator Duel of Commanders is a powerful game that mercilessly exposes you to the consequences of your own actions. Here it depends only on the experience and the skill of the player. He alone determines the success or failure of a mission.

The most important elements at a glance:
Hidden Setup: Both commanders take their turns on the mission map in secret, the allied side cannot see below the surface of the water on the battle map.

On/Under/Above the Water: The battles between the submarine and Allied ships and planes take place on a three-dimensional, diveable section of the Atlantic.

Triple blind system: On the one hand, movements of the opponents on the mission maps are hidden from view and on the other hand, the submerged submarine in the ocean is protected from the eyes of the allies. This „blindness“ can only be broken by the tracking devices.

Electronic tracking devices: By using the listening device, lookout, RADAR and ASDIC, the enemy‘s position on the map can be determined without revealing one‘s own position.
„Toggleable Luck Factor“: The toggleable Luck Factor allows you to reduce the default „Realistic Luck Factor“ to zero. So when you replay a mission with swapped sides, you‘ll encounter exactly the same conditions.

Electrically programmed solo missions: Electrically predefined solo missions give you the feeling of playing with a real player.
Magnetic, height-adjustable play elements:
Due to the magnetic height adjustment of the submarine and the aircraft, a smooth adjustment is possible.

The development story of Duel of Commanders from day one:
https://boardgamegeek.com/thread/2891322/how-i-almost-finished-developing-submarine-board-g/page/1

—description from the designer

description:
A fun and unique game!

Namasté introduces players to the world of Yoga through 5 different simple and engaging motion games.

The game was developed with Lorena Pajalunga, founder and President of the Italian Yoga Association for Children AIYB.

The positions of yoga are numerous.

We have chosen 40, which are representative and affordable for children. These 40 positions were illustrated by the magical pen of Lorenzo Terranera (Ballarò and many other spells) and then placed on large-format cards, which are divided into two groups.

There are 20 “easier” positions, the cards with green backs, and 20 “less easy”, purple ones, so that all children, in different age groups, can experiment and play.

On each card the name of the asana is written in Sanskrit, the ancient language of India, but don't be scared ... it's just to learn something more, because in the 10 pages of the book with the detailed explanation of all 40 positions you will find the Italian translation of the name of the asana. For each asana the inspiration is also described, the detail of how it must be performed and, very nice, what you learn by practicing it.
Many different games can be played with the contents of this box.

In addition to those that you can invent yourself, 5 are described below, which aim to entertain children (and adults) in many different ways, stimulating creativity (game 1: "Invent your story), memory ( game 2: "Remember the sequence" and game 4: "Make the quartet") and learning the names of the asanas (game 3: "Guess the name"), developing with everyone the improvement of the practice (game 5: "Overcome the teacher").

If playing with children under the age of 6, it is recommended that an adult play the role of the moderator, or teacher. From 6-7 years onwards, the role of the Master can be played, in turn, by the players themselves.

Even if a specific game mode is indicated, all 5 games can be played:

with a single deck of 20 face down cards and taking the top card of the deck from time to time, as in game 1
with 5 piles (4 cards of each type) and throwing the fuchsia die to choose the card, as in game 2
with 4 piles (5 cards of each color) and rolling the black die to choose the card, as in game 3
throwing both dice and looking in the deck for the corresponding card, as in game 5
Before starting to play it must be emphasized that the practice of Yoga must never hurt, and for this reason the positions must always be performed slowly. it is important to respect your limits and not forget that our bodies are not all the same: ease and difficulty vary greatly from one person to another, and an easy asana for one player could be difficult for another.

Contains: 49 cards, 2 dice, 1 gong and 1 book of 24 pages.

For centuries, Norfolk Castle has been the scene of terrifying events! All because of the ravenous ghost that haunts him. To defeat this evil specter it is necessary to lock it back into the crypt. Three fearless hunters will venture through the castle rooms to end the dark curse. And to do so they will use all possible means ... including magic!
A game of fear and terror A Ghost to lock up, mysterious rituals to perform for an ultimate thrill adventure Use the Decoder Disc to discover the secret elements of the Ghost.

The players will have to move their pawns inside the board, which represents the castle where the ghost roams free.
Using the powers of the cards, players will have to overcome all the obstacles and enemies present in the various rooms of the castle and collect the various elements present, in order to correctly perform the magical ritual, using the decoder disc to know the secret elements necessary to imprison the ghost once and for all.

Solve a case of a stolen chair or ball or something else. You have witnesses with statements. When? Where? Who?
Find and connect a clues. Be the best detective.

Set up a location board. The board is modular so no two maps have to be the same. Players in a turn have 12 action points that they use to perform actions. Such as moving around, investigating the scene, questioning another detective and questioning a witness. Each action costs a certain number of action points. During setup, a solution is randomly selected according to the set locations.
Winner is the player who discovers the correct combination for the solution by announcing in her/his turn that have the solution and says it. But be careful, if you make a mistake, you are out of the game. Then player in secret look to see if it was right. If so, show everyone and win the game. If not, return the solution back and is out of the game.

Nani e Giganti is the new board game for children by Lisciani. A fun adventure to be able to overcome many obstacles by managing two characters together.
Simplicity reigns supreme with Dwarves and Giants. For all children who are approaching board games for the first time or for those who do not want to learn too many rules. Fast and immediate.
We prepare the board in the center of the table and place our Dwarf and our Giant in the starting boxes. We make the Movement deck, the Help deck and the Unexpected deck available to everyone. We take 2 Talisman tokens each.
We begin to advance on the board by drawing a Movement card and discarding it immediately. We will choose to move either our Dwarf or our Giant in the direction that interests us most, even backwards. Warning: the Dwarf cannot cross the Ravine and the Giant the Web unless they have Help cards that specify otherwise.
The effects of the boxes:
- Purple box (neutral) - nothing happens.
- Weed, Swamp, River box - if you end the movement on one of them, you will need to draw an Unexpected card and immediately apply its effect.
- Help Box - the relevant card is drawn and held without showing it to the other players.
Help cards will serve us to attack others or to defend ourselves.
If you draw the Witch card in the Movement deck, you can defend yourself by spending a Talisman. If there are none, the game for that player will be over.
Spending a Talisman will also serve to bring one of our eliminated characters back into play.

The game is won by the player who brings both characters to the exit or, if all are left with only one character, the single who reaches it first.

boardgame: Europa Universalis: The Price of Power (Deluxe Edition)
description:
This is the Deluxe Edition with Ages I, II, and III; the West Europe map; and the Fate of Empires expansion adding support for 5-6 players; the East Europe Map; and Age IV all in one box.  Includes solo mode by Dávid Turczi. The board game is based on the famous computer strategy game series and captures the heart and soul of the game.

Govern one of Europe's great nations through the Ages of Discovery, Reformation, Absolutism, and Revolutions — spanning more than three hundred years of history. Lift your nation out of the slumber of the Dark Ages and create a glorious empire, through clever diplomacy, brave exploration, and ruthless conquest. Each of the playable nations has its own very unique opportunities and challenges.

Europa Universalis is a strategy board game that gives players a full 4X game experience in a historical setting. Through the strategic use of cards and careful management of resources, you can expand your realm on the map board, while at the same time developing the internal machinery of the state on your player board. You must build diplomatic relations that support your ambition and you can explore far-away parts of the world. By recruiting skilled advisors and carefully investing monarch power in great ideas, province development, and long-term strategies, you may well be able to outshine your historical counterparts.

The goal of the game is to build the most successful empire, and points are scored for (amongst other things) owned provinces, explored territories, diplomatic relations, victories in wars, and secret objectives that have been accomplished.

description:
Armed with machetes, four archaeologists follow ancient writings in search of the tomb of Alexander the Great in the jungles of India.
by Beoplast

The board is divided into spaces. Players draw tiles that are marked with letters. To place the tiles on the board they must form words by building a path to the tomb.
They then roll a dies to gain movement points and move along the constructed path. But beware, the paths will cross with the path of the opponent.
So that everyone can use everyone's road. The first player to reach the tomb and return to their starting position is the winner.

This is the expansion to the Standard Edition of Europa Universalis: The Price of Power, adding 5-6 players, the East Europe Map, and Age IV.

Govern one of Europe's great nations through the Ages of Discovery, Reformation, Absolutism, and Revolutions — spanning more than three hundred years of history. Lift your nation out of the slumber of the Dark Ages and create a glorious empire, through clever diplomacy, brave exploration, and ruthless conquest. Each of the playable nations have their own very unique opportunities and challenges.

Europa Universalis is a strategy board game that gives players a full 4X game experience in a historical setting. Through the strategic use of cards and careful management of resources, you can expand your realm on the map board, while at the same time developing the internal machinery of the state on your player board. You must build diplomatic relations that support your ambition and you can explore far-away parts of the world. By recruiting skilled advisors and carefully investing monarch power in great ideas, province development, and long-term strategies, you may well be able to outshine your historical counterparts.

This is a game for 1–6 players (depending on the various scenarios included). The goal of the game is to build the most successful empire, and points are scored for (amongst other things) owned provinces, explored territories, diplomatic relations, victories in wars, and secret objectives that have been accomplished.

The board game is based on the famous strategy game series by Paradox Interactive and captures the heart and soul of the grandness that makes the computer game so magnificent.

Includes solo mode by Dávid Turczi.

The famous game of the goose, reinvented and declined in the fun style of monsters! In fact, hanging from the package there is also the beautiful monster pendant, which drives away fear!
Even the traditional game of the goose finally speaks the language of monsters!
Roll the dice and run along the swirling road without ever stopping!
But watch out for the pitfalls of the Boccalarga monster present on many squares of the board ...
Play a timeless classic game with monster friends!
Contains the beautiful three-dimensional monster, dice and plastic seat markers! And all proudly produced in Italy. Hurray!

Four Snail Mail Carriers are out on their routes and it's your job to help them make their deliveries.

Your Snail Mail Carrier's bag will be filled with four cards, each containing a number and a color. To complete deliveries, you'll need your cards to match the goal on a Delivery Card.

For example, do all your Mail Cards have the colors green and blue? Then you've matched the "All Green and Blue" Delivery card and win that card.

Lots of different Delivery Cards allow for a different game every time. The first player to complete six deliveries wins the game.

Contents: 4 Plastic Snail Shaped Card Racks, Deck of 48 Mail Cards, Deck of 23 Delivery Cards, Illustrated Instructions.

-description from publisher

In Action, the director is you!

Act out everyday life situations so that other players can guess them!

During your game turn, draw 4 "situation" cards and stage them as effectively as possible using the character cubes and the equipment at your disposal.

You have 90 seconds to guess the 4 situations.
Score one point for each correctly performed situation.
Also score a point if you are the player who guessed the staged situation.

After 2 or 3 rounds, the player with the most points wins!

Compose your team and face an opponent in this miniature duel game!
Find the universe of Dragon Ball Z with your favorite characters and their special techniques in epic clashes for the quest of crystal balls

After composing your team according to the skill points of the different characters, go in search of the crystal balls! Would you rather face your opponent directly or search the board for bonuses?

On your turn, you can activate your characters one after the other, by rolling their action die. You can then perform 3 out of 5 possible actions: remove an immobilization, move, search, attack, acquire a capsule card. In addition, you can also launch a special attack like the famous Kamehameha!

KO opposing characters to earn victory points.

The game ends if a team is completely knocked out or after 7 rounds of play. The player with the most victory points wins.

This entry is for the playable demo, which features a small extract of the full game.


Mazescape is a fascinating and intriguing game of labyrinths for one player that guarantees intense brain racking moments as you search for the exit. It is a game you can take anywhere and play time and time again to discover all the different nooks and crannies of the seven maps included.

It is a completely unique concept that promises to equally surprise and create headaches in equal measure. In this original game from Devir, you will unfold a map on the table, where you will start at the compass rose with the pointer you will find in the box, moving it along the labyrinth paths marked in white without ever lifting it from the map. You will have to open and close different parts of the map in search of the Impossible Triangle that will allow you to escape the maze. You can go under bridges, climb up ladders and run around in circles in the maze and in your own head until the exit finally leads you to… the next map!

In Mazescape: Labýrinthos you will go through three well defined territories: the docks, the graveyard, and the mountain. The first of the maps will help you to understand the most essential concepts of the game. Then. from there, they will become progressively more complicated until reaching the final challenge. They also have a bunch of secondary objectives that you can explore to get the very most out of the game.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Fateforge: Chronicles of Kaan – Clash of the Immortals
description:
In Clash of the Immortals, you set off on an epic journey across the continent of Kaan – a journey that will take you from dragon’s lairs among icy mountain peaks, across vast steppes where a young warlord is raising a horde to challenge the throne, and to the cursed ruins of an ancient city deep in the desert wastes. You will find yourself tipping the balance of power between two immortal leaders with vast ambitions – the Ilkral, undying ruler of the Kartaçöl empire, and Lady Bekasi, the undead lich who is the true force behind the throne of the old Kaan. Your homeland – and all of Kaan – is bound up in their ruthless designs, as they vie with each other to gain an ancient weapon that could lay waste to the world. What Fate will you forge for the lands of Kaan?

Clash of the Immortals is the first expansion for Fateforge: Chronicles of Kaan containing a new campaign, a completely new gameplay mechanic and a new hero, among other things. The new campaign sees our heroes move out of Easafir and its environs, where the campaign of the base game takes place, and journey across Kaan.

The expansion adds a new gameplay feature: party skills. These are powerful skills that the whole party can contribute to in order to unleash group moves that add a new level of coordination and complexity to the game.

Clash of the Immortals also features a new hero, the Enchantress, whose powerful magic makes her play differently from other heroes. The expansion contains two new floorplan sets, the desert ruins and mountain sets, along with new story scene tiles. Finally will come across new side quests, rest locations, enemies, weapons and items.

The Limited Deluxe Edition of the Clash of the Immortals expansion includes deluxe enemy discs and deluxe tokens that will fit with your Limited Deluxe Edition Base game components. The Boss Box includes the Boss miniature featured in the expansion.

—description from the publisher
family: Versions & Editions: Board Game Versions of Role-Playing Games

description:
Imagine that all the main characters of "Inside Lapenko" were at your disposal.

In each round, you can become an Engineer, Shershnyaga, Igor Katamaranov and others. All characters have special properties that make them unique.

The goal of the game is to get as many Audience Points as possible.
And each hero does it differently.

While the players are making cunning plans and trying to predict the actions of their opponents in order to get ahead, a common danger looms over everyone - the Iron Sleeves organized crime group.

The bandits are hunting for the characters in order to rob them to the skin, and each rival is trying to make sure that it is you who fall into their criminal clutches.

Each turn, face down players choose a ploy card to create difficulty for the other players. And then a character card with a unique property. Audience points are scored based on the popularity of the character played (from 0 to 5) and the ability that triggers when the card is played.

The game consists of 6 rounds, in each round you play one character card. Each player has 10 character cards in their deck, which ensures good replayability.

boardgame: Tic Tac K.O.: Dragons vs Unicorns – Hoarder Promo Card
description:
A holographic promo card that was originally available at conventions.

Special Dragon Card:
-When this card enters the Grid, each player on your team may DRAW a card for each Objective your team has completed.

In Hastilude, players take on the roles of the King's most trusted advisors. You are tasked with using your workers to train and equip knights to enter tournaments, complete quests, and fill the orders from the king himself.

Hastilude is a worker placement game where you must figure out the best way to utilize your workforce. You start the game with five workers and one knight. Finding the balance between having a good-sized workforce and the right amount of knights to score victory points is one of the challenges of the game.

You must also decide how to use your knights. Knights are the primary way you score victory points and acquire gold to support your plans. Focusing on gaining gold could put you behind on victory points, and focusing too much on victory points and you could find yourself short of gold when you really need it. Your workers are tasked with collecting resources to turn them into equipment to aid your knights. Workers will gather resources and turn them into armor, weapons, and shields.

In Hastilude, the player who can best manage their workforce and their knights will come out victorious.

–description from designer

After the exile of MEDUSA in a distance, the gods POSEIDON and ATHENS stood between them and fought a new competition to discover which of the two island is the most acclaimed god in Greece. So ask for the help of the god DIONÍSIUS and together they created a THEATER FESTIVAL to mark the beginning of winter entitled OSCHOPHORIA.
     They invited the greatest artistic producers in Greece to represent them and thus, PRODUCE a GREAT THEATER SHOW. And for this dispute to become more fierce, the gods create an unquestionable rule: 'THE SCENARIO used in productions must contain perfect sculptures'. And for that, it will be necessary that NOBLE ACTORS SACRIFICE themselves in great pose and style, facing MEDUSA on their island to be PETRIFIED. And later these statues must be RESCUE and linked to the great show.
      Other gods would also like to participate in this event helping producers with specific powers.

You'll have up to 15 turns to create the best show. At the beginning of the game, you must choose whether to defend the interests of Athena or Poseidon. Your choice will determine which benefits you get at the start of the game. The game will have a maximum of 15 turns, which may decrease depending on the perks earned during the match. Managing your time during the match will be essential to build the minimum necessary to score. At the end of the game, the player must have the minimum necessary to count the points.
Each player will have four meeples to move around the board, collecting resources distributed in nine factories. You will also be able to collect cast cards, mask cards and also petrified statues on the island of "MEDUSA".

The roll of the dice will serve to create the resources in the factories and also to make the movement of the four producers.

To take an actor to the island of "MEDUSA", just enter with your meeple in the place destined for this. And to rescue a statue of your petrified actor, the player must have another actor hired and also a mask activated. To hire actors and activate masks it will be necessary to allocate the correct components to each card.

On the board there is a space for market transactions between players. And some houses of movement, called squares of Dionysus. When stopping at these squares, the player will receive resources in gold. With this gold you can offer and receive help from other gods. Every time the player receives 3 gold, he must advance one turn on his turn track.

The game ends when the first player reaches the "0" square on the turn track. And the winning player will be the one who scores the most points with their hired squad cards, rescued statues and resource filling on their individual show sheet (chosen at the beginning of the game).

The sum of this score will show which player manages to perform the best show in honor of the chosen god. And if there is a tie, art always wins and all players share the victory.

Players answer questions about Geneva by moving their game pieces on a board that represents the canton of Geneva, its roads and its highway.

A bonus card is awarded for each correct answer. The first player to win a card of each color wins the game.

The colors correspond to themes: green = agriculture/oenology, yellow = history/culture/religion, orange = international organizations/tourism, blue = industry/transportation/commerce, red = finance/services/real estate

Соображарий: Герои ("Think it up!: Heroes") is a new version of the famous board game for cozy little companies and grand parties. This time you have to quickly remember the most famous people of different times and nations! Don't forget about your sense of humor too: the name of one of your rivals can be a suitable answer to a tricky question!

     Open the task

     Be the first to name the correct answer

tspelopdewagen is an alternative location that belongs to the buying souvenirs - category. So it can become your starting point or one of the locations for mission card 6.

Biohazard is the 8th expansion of Clinic Deluxe Edition.

At the time of publication it was advertised as the final expansion, but was followed in 2024 by a 9th expansion: 6th Extension.

“To conclude the Clinic: Deluxe Edition series, I wanted to focus on the disposal and recycling of all the refuse produced when patients are treated. This final, lone expansion is compatible with all expansions, because it merely depends on having nurses and orderlies, which are part of the base game! If you can include Janitors from The Extension, you can experience my full vision. I know the janitors already have a lot of challenging work, but as CEO of my own game, I am now adding a new role to their job description: They must tend to biohazards!”

—description from the rulebook

Background
The morning after the general meeting of an allotment garden association, the chairman Alfred Klein is found dead.
Does the death have something to do with the city's planned new construction project? Or has the neighborhood war that has been raging for a long time come to a deadly end?
