The dice are rolled in turn, each part of the sea lion's body has a number (1-6). The number of the dice determines which part of the sea lion is put together, following a certain order. Step by step the sea lion is completed. The first to assemble all the parts wins the game.

Escape to the West is an original Czech escape game, which follows the story of Pavel from the 70th year of the last century. Help Paul escape from severe totalitarianism through the Iron Curtain. The story will be accompanied by cards with puzzles, from which you will compile a map that will help you come up with the best way to get to West Germany. Will you be able to escape across a closely watched border?

boardgame: Anahata: El juego de la vida natural
description:
A nature-themed board game with mechanics similar to Game of Goose, with additional features such as nature-related trivia questions, or request to perform theatric actions.

—user summary

Today we have for you a wonderful gift – a free quest map for your adventure-hungry heroes crafted by our very own Doug Hopkins, designer on the HeroQuest Game System. This quest map will allow you to expand the HeroQuest experience while adding a few wrinkles that all you Zargons out there might enjoy.

We asked Doug about his inspiration for this map, and here is what he had to say:

“We wanted to provide an opportunity for experienced heroes (who completed the core system quest book) to connect to our Kellar’s Keep quest pack. Allowing them to tell the story of their journey to the Great Gate seemed like it could be a lot of fun. If our heroes want to pass through the World’s End Mountains they will need to enter the Forsaken Tunnels of Xor-Xel in this dangerous quest. Are you up to the challenge? The quest is calling!”

That means this mission is intended to be played after the core quest book. The heroes have braved Mentor’s various tasks and have been awarded the title of “Champion” by the King, but new dangers have emerged! Mentor has informed the heroes that the King and what remains of his army have been trapped in the ancient dwarven stronghold of Kaba Karn, under siege by Zargon’s forces. Time is of the essence if the heroes hope to save the King, and the only available entrance into Kaba Karn is the Forsaken Tunnels of Xor-Xel.

If the heroes are brave enough to face this challenge and are successful, then the story may naturally progress into the quests provided in the Kellar’s Keep expansion! But keep in mind this is no easy feat, as the dark tunnels hold many Dread secrets.

—description from the publisher's website

This game uses the Rainbow Deck to provide a path placement storytelling experience, with critical decisions being taken narratively and relying on the player's discretion with just a few fixed mechanics.

During gameplay, the player will create a path from a starting card to an ending card. Every new path carries with it a situation where the player must intervene in some way, by either spelling words with the cards in their hand or otherwise using the pictures in the center of the cards for a narratively acceptable conclusion; the details and outcome are decided entirely at the player's discretion.

A reimplementation of Quest for the MacGlyphin, which originally used the Glyph deck. A companion piece to Travels in the Land of Glyph, and an attempt to use similar storytelling mechanics in a more game-y fashion, goal-oriented.

In the year 1587 an act was passed for "the quieting and keeping in obedience of the disordeit and subjectis inhabitants of the Borders, Highlands, and Isles."

Along with this, a list of Clans, 13 Clans. 13 of the most notorious of the Border Reivers. In the game, you will play as one of these Clans. Collect Livestock, Crops, Followers, and Soldiers and use them to build your Clan's influence. With them, you will purchase "Holdings," land, Armies, and Strongholds, gaining you victory points. Gain the most victory points and become the most prominant Clan on the border.

As a Clan Chief, you will perform 1 of 2 actions on your turn: Gather Tokens or purchase Holdings. When purchasing Holdings you will also gain sheep for your pasture but beware, a Reiver is at first a theif. You or your neighboring Clans may conduct raids, stealing sheep from one another. Sheep are a valued resource and are worth victory points; a large flock could tilt the victory in your favor. Lastly: Each individual Clan has a unique ability drawn from the annals of history. The Devil's Dozen brings the history, hardships, fueds, and forays of the 16th Century Border life to the game table...

-description from publisher
MAD Motion Attack Defense is a two-player game.

boardgame: WatchMojo: A Super Fan Top 10 Party Game
description: In WatchMojo: A Super Fan Top 10 Party Game, you submit entries to Top 10 Lists about pop culture subjects to be judged and ranked by the game round's ranker.

Welcome to the Loteria Mexicano: a real tradition in Mexico! Choose your character and bet on the number of tricks you plan to win. Try to aim right because if you lose, you remove as many clothes as the gap between your bet and the folds won! Bluff and audacity are your key words. The first one who ends up naked... lost!

-description from publisher's website

The game lasts for 6 rounds. In each round, players bid for the number of tricks they can win.  The sum of bidding cannot equal to the number of cards dealt that round.  The first round has 5 cards, then 4, 3, 2, 1, 1.  In a trick, players must play a card higher than the previous one or fold.  At the end of a round, if players cannot match their bid, they have to close cloth cards (7 at the start of game).  At the end, the player with most clothes wins the game.

-user summary

boardgame: Hippity Hop to the Carrot Shop
description:
This is a roll-and-move race game for children in which players are bunnies trying to beat each other to the carrot shop.

As players move around the board, they may land on carrot spaces, which allow them to collect carrot cards. Other spaces force them to give the carrots back.

At the end of the game, there is an automatic point bonus for the players in first, second, and third place. To these scores are added the number of carrot cards each player has, and the player with the highest score - not the first to reach the shop - wins the game.

Get together with your friends and family around the Tree Trimming Game board. Help place ornament tiles on the tree to create a balanced design. Laugh and sing with Holiday Spirit cards! Everyone will be answering fun questions about the holidays or singing seasonal songs!

The Tree Trimming Game is a cooperative puzzle game for family and friends for 2 to 24 players. Take turns placing ornament tiles on the tree so that the same tiles are never next to each other! When an ornament tile is placed in a starred space the player draws a Holiday Spirit card. These cards have questions, song prompts, and other fun seasonal surprises!

The players win when they fill every spot on the tree with ornaments. The player with the fewest tiles puts the star on the tree! Happy Holidays!

A special Kickstarter Master of the Seas version only be available during the Kickstarter Campaign.

All three games of the Series in one huge box.

This is an action/dexterity game for kids, probably first sold in the 1930s. Players place colored marbles in a tiny cup at the end of a flexible metal strip and flip them on to the board, where they land in holes labeled 6, 12, 18, 24, 30, 36, 60, or 90 (higher numbers being harder to achieve).

Highest score wins.

This is advertised as a "kindergarten game." Players each take one of four coops and colored sticks of the same color. There is also a pile of chick cards.

If the spinner lands on a chick icon, the player places a chick in their own coop. If it lands on a color, whomever has the matching sticks use one to start or continue building a fence around their coop. Once a single coop is fenced in, all players count their chicks and the one with the most wins.

Released early 1940s.

A space conglomerate-corporation is building a new Dyson Sphere in an uncharted galaxy. They're looking for a "go-to" crew of mercenaries and pioneers, so they've issued a galaxy-wide challenge... Bring them what they need in a timely manner and you'll be rewarded with a full-time contract(handsome salaries and benefits included).

Build a crew, mod your ship, and race against the other competing crews, to mine resources and battle your way to victory! This is an uncharted galaxy, so anything goes.

The game board is customizable and modular, so gameplay is different every time you play. Before you start the game, players will take turns placing game pieces for the session. You can play however you'd like!

A single mission card, showing which resources and how much of each are required, is drawn for the game session (all players will be racing to complete this). The first player to gather the requested resources and travels back to the space station wins the game. All players (given three random crew members) start at the space station at the beginning of the game, and roll dice to determine how far they can navigate that turn(crew skills can increase this roll).

Once a player has reached a planet or asteroid(each have their own unique resources) they can mine. You can mine a planet once per turn, for a max of two turns. Mining does not end your turn however, so its best to start it by mining every time.

You can also battle other players to steal their resources, eliminate crew members, or destroy any tech mods they may have. This requires you to be on the same spot as the opposing player however. Another way to use your turn is to spend any unneeded resources to upgrade your ship with tech mods or new crew members (max of 4).

Once a player has acquired the necessary resources to complete the mission card, they must navigate back to where they started the game. Once they have arrived, they win the game. Watch out for other players trying to steal your loot though!

-description from designer

In this game, chits with different symbols on them - wheels, anchors, bells, crowns, and stars - are distributed amongst the players, who keep their pile face down. On each turn, a player tries to match a symbol with the preceding one to create a pair or chain for ever-increasing bonuses.

Next to the temple, where you and your team of physicians are striving to heal the sick and treat the wounded, lies the Agora. This main gathering place is filled with activity, commerce, politics, and people from every level of society. Navigate this central hub to find help for your new medical practice. Become the worthy successor to Hippocrates at the Agora!

In this expansion to Hippocrates, you will find 4 modules that can be added to the base game. 
You can choose to play with 1 or more of these modules in any combination.

Module 1: The Leaders
Earn extra VP by matching doctors and patients from the same region in the coring phase.

Module 2: The Nurses
You can now hire Nurses that will be assigned to your doctors, aiding them to heal patients in more efficient ways.

Module 3: Benefactors and Nobles 
You can now seek the aid of Benefactors and Nobles. benefactors will offer you permanent advantages throughout the game, whereas Nobles will help you gain more VP at the end of the game. But both of these will come at a cost … 

Module 4: The Events
If you really wanna shake up your game of Hippocrates, dare introduce the events to the game. The more proactive gamers will be rewarded, but beware of the calamities that will plague your adventure in Ancient Greece.

-description from publisher

Welcome Words is a coop-picture-word-association cardgame for 2-5 players.

Each round one player has to guess a term (an adjective) that was chosen randomly out of 5 terms from a laying out word card. All other players try to help them by playing a picture card that fits the chosen term best. After that they play a second picture card that fits the opposite of the chosen term best. Then the guessing player has to make their guess.

The game ends when each player was the guessing player twice. The goal for the group is to describe and guess as many terms correctly as possible.

-description from designer
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

description:
The farm is in chaos! The animals have wandered everywhere.
Now it’s up to you to bring them all back to their own paddocks.

You can play this game in two ways:
COOPERATIVE – make sure the animals get back to their own paddocks. But watch out! All animals must be back before dark or everyone loses!

COMPETITIVE – cross your fellow player(s) by blocking the paddock. Will you be the first to drive your livestock into their own paddocks?

—description from the publisher

There’s a party in the jungle!

Swing along with the monkey and see who’s come to visit the jungle. Throw a party with the lion, rhino, zebra and many other animals. But wait, not all animals are complete!

Collect the correct animal game pieces by walking around with the monkey. If you play smart, the monkey can run and swing faster, or slower. What’s the best move? Complete the animals and celebrate your own jungle party. Are you the first to do so? Then you’ve won this adventurous game!

During a turn players choose one of the three actions: draw card, play a card or take 3 steps. Taking 3 steps is your main action and causes the monkey to stop on a certain animal. Take that animal and add it to your collection. By drawing a card or playing a card you already drew, you can move specific steps. Try to collect as many animal-parts and create animals until your animal party is complete.

-description from publisher

boardgame: Fireball Island: The Curse of Vul-Kar – Gutbuster Promo Card
description:
Card was available during the Secret Cabal 2021 Kickstarter campaign.

GUTBUSTER INJURY: When you end your turn on an unstable space, discard a treasure to the Maw.

boardgame: Fireball Island: The Curse of Vul-Kar – Instantiation Generator Promo Card
description:
Card was available during the Secret Cabal 2021 Kickstarter campaign.

Instantiation Generator Legendary Souvenir: At the end of the game, this counts as one of each color treasure
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
Now it's time to enter a magical world of fabulous and terrifying desserts!
You are the cooks hired for a great feast in honor of the hungry Queens with somewhat peculiar tastes. Everything is valid to win the favors of the Queens and stand out in the competition! And as for the others… We can't guarantee they'll manage to keep their heads...

Sirvam a Rainha is the newest trick-taking game in the Sirvam collection!
Each player starts the game with six recipe cards and each round they must vote on which Queen's order to serve, establishing the trick rules of this round. Cards are sweets of different types, qualities and flavors. After the cards are selected, it's time to serve the feast. SERVE THE QUEEN!

The game comes with 5 different queens, each with their own tastes and scoring method. Whether it's the Twin Queens who disagree with their preferred type or the Mathematical Queen that wants the cards in numerical sequence, it's up to players to adapt at the demands and offer the best dishes at the feast.

-description from publisher

"Hui, schlitter, plautz! Here am I, the Penguin Pingu from south pole. I have invited all my friends. We will make a race, do you want to join us? Then go for it! That will be fun. And for not beeing hungry, we will take a huge amount of fish with us. The fastest player which reaches the goal wins!"

The penguins are on the way. They are jumping from floe to floe. But be careful, there are floes which are not stable anymore. In some cases also the water is a good idea, but only if there is no Orca in the way.

The penguin family which reaches first the south pole wins the game!

boardgame: Escape Room: In der Hand des Entführers
description:
The original Escape Crime Game in the practical card box

The daughter of a very rich industrialist was kidnapped - ransom demand: one and a half million euros! The criminal police put YOU on it, their special officer for tricky cases. You set about investigating, but are knocked out from behind at the point where the ransom is handed over. When you wake up, you find yourself chained in the basement of an abandoned office building with no food or the slightest clue as to what is in store for you. Can you break free, track down the missing girl and escape the kidnappers' hideout alive?

Casey
Speed: 0
VP: 2
Type: Human Villager
Effect: At the end of your turn: Values 2 VP when you are on the railroad.

Timoty
Speed: 0
VP: 1
Type: Human Villager
Effect: Timoty is considered at the same time military and villager.

Series formerly titled, 'Catapult Kingdoms'.

During setup, each player places one Tree on the highest viable place in their castle. If/when the Tree falls or is knocked off, the player whose tree fell gets to fire it at the attacking opponent in retribution for such an unceremonious felling of the festive tree. When firing it at your opponent, players are encouraged to yell "Tannenbaum!!!"

Includes:
- 4 x Holiday Tree Ammo

Vampire Knights fight against Human Sorcerers for supremacy. And the currency within the game? Dragon Blood! Extract just a few drops and unleash powers and purchases from the Dark Armory. Line up your warrior, weapon and dragon, then attack. This game is for 2-4 players and takes about 10 minutes to learn. The goal is to remove 500 blood points from all opponents before they do the same to you!

Series formerly titled, 'Catapult Kingdoms'.

Each player gets one Secret Santa Gift Ammo. During your turn, instead of launching a boulder, you may launch the gift instead! In addition to any damage, if the ammo lands inside your opponent's castle, the closest troop picks it up and opens the gift. They are so moved by the kindness of the gesture that they decide to switch teams! Remove that troop from the enemy's castle, get a troop matching your color from the box and place them following the Troop Placement rules in your castle!

Includes:
- 4 x Gift Ammo

The Death Star exhaust port is only two metres wide but the Rebel Fleet must make a direct hit in order to destroy the Death Star! As leader of your fleet, organize your crews, and make your attack runs.

The aim of the game is to successfully complete Attack Runs to earn Target Points. Each player has a defense value they use to deflect Imperial attacks on their path to the Exhaust Port. They can even call on Obi-Wan Kenobi for help. Players who have earned four or more Target Points from previous Attack Runs can finally take aim and try to destroy the Death Star. The first player to do this is the winner!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Die of the Dead: The Ofrenda Variant
description:
It’s time to prepare your ofrenda, tonight is the Day of the Dead! Make your altar the most beautiful of all, decorate the borders with papel picado, shower it with marigold flowers and bring only the freshest bread, food and drink, so the souls of the deceased can rest and eat and drink, recovering their strengths in their long trip between the land of the dead and the living. As night falls and the moon rises, light the candles and incense, let your altar become a guiding beacon for the spirits going home.

The Ofrenda Variant takes the Die of the Dead dice, caskets and steps, and transforms them into a dice drafting game in which players attempt to make their altars the most appealing to their ancestors. Instead of putting dice in caskets players are drafting dice from caskets, to reprsent the bread, candles, incense and marigolds which will adorn their altars.

The Ofrenda Variant offers a puzzle based spin on Die of the Dead, for players who love the theme and beauty but prefer something less on the luck side of things. In order to enable more people to play Die of the Dead to celebrate Dia de Muertos, this expansion also contains a solo mode, something only possible with the cerebral nature of this variant.

-description from publisher

boardgame: Die of the Dead: The Xolo Expansion
description:
It's Dia de Muertos, along with dawn the spirits of the dead come out to pay a visit to their loved ones, party and eat and drink once again all their favorite dishes. But these souls are many and excited, they pass through the world in a hurry and sometimes even forget where their homes are, how come they don’t get lost? Luckily the xoloitzcuintles are here! The bonds with man’s best friend are so strong that they surpass life and death, and these loyal dogs are ready to help the dead find their way back home.

The Xolo Expansion introduces the xoloitzcuintle to Die of the Dead. These loyal dogs can be used to guide other players to caskets, encouraging them to pick ones which benefit you, for more dice manipulation options on the future. Featuring more ways to mainpulate dice and each other, tokens, casket boards and custom dice, The Xolo Expansion takes everything people love about Die of the Dead and makes more of it.

-description from publisher

boardgame: Twin Stars: Moonset – Scenario #1: Destroy the Artifact
description:
A new episodic game that reimplements Twin Stars.

Each episode includes a Scenary postcard and 2 cards.

A few big updates from Twin Stars. A lot mostly in the visual side. It uses cubes, and it uses them on the card instead of using the edges of the card for tracking. Characters have skills, store items and other things on their cards. You can also gain Hide or Hunt. With Hide, you can re-roll an alert die (which is an extra die, not a die on an alert symbol), and Hunt allows you to try for an extra star.


Scenario: Destroy the Artifact

The venomous Snake Warriors have destroyed Wynx Keep in their quest to tplle anything in sight. At this point only treacherous rubble remains. Your old mentor named Redeshia reaches out and begs your party to rush to recover the evil artifact that resides there. She warns that if it gets into the hand of the Snake Warriors, the war will never end.

You need to find the artifact in the rubble and destroy it before the war advances to the point of no return.

Characters:


     Korma Ranogh
     Saria Balgalor

In this game, 1 to 4 players take on the role of human characters, who must survive a night trapped inside the Museum, working together, engaging in combat, solving riddles, and collecting various items such as weapons, keys, or ancient artifacts from the exhibition, to fulfill different missions that will allow them to escape alive, before their time runs out.

A single player will take on the role of the ghost priest. His sole purpose is eliminate all humans who wander around the museum, so that they serve as ritual sacrifice to the ancient gods. To do this, he will have the help of subortinated entities and various EVENTS that will occur every in-game “hour”.

HOW TO PLAY (overview):

Each round, HUMAN characters play following their specific character order. HUMAN players get two actions each turn, which can use to a) move, b) use Healing or defensive ITEMS (on themselves or on another player, adjacent to them) or c) share ITEMS with another adjacent player. Players can also skip one or both of their actions, and throw away unwanted ITEMS to clear storage space (each player can carry up to 4 ITEMS)

Last is the GHOST PRIEST's turn: each turn, this character plays one card from his/ her GHOST DECK: these cards show different Chess movements, that the GHOST can perform during his/ her turn.

After the GHOST’s turn, the game’s clock is moved 10 “minutes” and a new round begins.

When an in-game “hour” is completed, the GHOST resets his/ her deck, and takes an EVENT card: its instructions are followed by all players.

If a HUMAN looses all HP, get’s WOUNDED: its unable to move, use ITEMS and has to let go of all ITEMS. If another player doesn’t heal the WOUNDED player during 3 turns, the wounded character DIES, and transforms into another GHOST, hunting down his/ her former allies onwards.

Each game is set around a different story or “game mode”, that sets different player counts and goals. There are currently 3 different modes:
“THIEVES IN THE SHADOWS” is a quik heist mission, with one side acting as thieves, and another defending the museum’s artifacts (no EVENTS).
“NIGHT OF THE RITUAL” is a 4-5 player story, involving secret objectives for each player.
THE SKULL SHRINE” is a story campaign for 2-3 players.

All campaigns have a time limit. If time runs out and players can’t achieve their specific goals, HUMANS automatically lose.

-description from designer

The gallery is seeking new masterpieces! In Canvas: Finishing Touches, complete your works of art and show them off to the world with the new Frames! These Frames add a layer of interaction as players compete to have their work displayed on the gallery wall.

Also features:
Platinum Ribbons - Grab a Platinum Ribbon whenever your painting is framed in the gallery.

New Scoring Cards for puzzling new challenges and added replayability.

A two player tile/card placement game where the players aim to connect other islands to their island, and will earn more points the further away the other islands are.

On their turn, a player places a card. The game is played on a 5x5 grid with the deck placed in the center.  All card plays must be played adjacent to either the deck or a previously placed card. In addition to island cards, the deck includes special cards which can affect previously placed cards.

Play continues until the board is full and the player with the most points win.

The game came in a ziplock bag which included a plastic case for the game's cards, an unassembled paper box to store the game in, and a playmat to play on.  This solution was used as while the publisher's intention was to fit the components in the paper box, the playmat required too many folds to reach a size which would fit in the box and would then not lay flat enough to play; they note that the playmat is ultimately not required and the cards can be stored in the paper box.

EL Oso is a one-player board game. You need 24 checkers (12 in each of two colors), five 6-sided dice, and a simple 5x5 game board.

The challenge of El Oso is to move your stacks of pieces across the board, without encountering the pieces of your opponent (“The Bear”). Your moves are completely under your control, but the Bear’s moves are random. Plan carefully and don’t expose yourself to too much risk, and you’ll get your team across the board.

Flying Saucers is a strategy game in which 2-4 players have spaceships of different power and speed. Your task is to neutralize either all enemy ships or the enemy "generator" (which supplies all ships with energy). The battle is fought with the formation of energetic majorities; thus: a 2-FS neutralizes an enemy 1-FS, two 2-FS neutralize an enemy 3, etc. Neutralized FS remain as (impassable) space trash, but can be reactivated. Another scenario is collecting ore.

Flying Saucers has an expansion. This contains more scenarios such as the production of panels and the expansion of base stations, the abduction of the robot pilots and some exciting new spaceships.

—description from the publisher (translated)

This version of dice solitaire gets its name from the game’s white die constantly “hopping” back and forth between your hand and row. Additionally, the player must “hold” the white die in their hand as part of the win condition.

You have six turns to win the game by making trades between dice in your hand and dice in the row so that all dice in the row are the same value and the white die ends in your hand.

—description from the designer

Tipping dice challenges for 2 to 6 players. Tip just 6 sided dice, How many dice can you tip onto a small card before one falls off, Tipping dice and adding the numbers to get closest to 50 and many other challenges. A dexterity game of tipping dice from a coffee cup. Get a point for each challenge you win and get 6 points to win!

boardgame: Take the Path the Number Dares
description:
A roll and write castle investigation game of building your corridors then traveling through them to find treasure and get out out. Start your turn by arranging your cards to make some new paths, roll the dice in dice, add the 2 numbers in the dice together and add the numbers on top of the dice together. Use 1 number to move and use the other to write where you stop.
Group numbers so you can skip tiles. Once all the treasure and keys have been found the game is over. The player with the highest score wins.

A push your luck fruit bag builder of picking the fruit and then trying to sell as much as you can, but you can only sell what you can remember. Pick your fruit from the bag, stop at anytime, but don't pick out rotten fruit or your turn is over. Once 5 rotten fruit have been picked, the selling phase begins. Roll the dice and try and remember what fruit are in your bag. Once a player earns $10 they win!

SIX LINKS is a word guessing game. Be the first team to score 30 points by correctly guessing mystery words based on 6 clues! But… more clues mean less points!

Players form two even teams and play the game in rounds. In a given round, one player on each team will be the hinter, and the remaining players will be guessers. Each round, a new clue card (that contains 6 clues and a mystery word) is drawn by the designated hinter. The hinter has the power to choose if their team will play first or pass the clue card to the other team.

The hinter of the starting team randomly pulls tokens from the bag, dictating which clues can be given. Their team has ONE guess at the mystery word — if they guess wrong, the clue card is passed to the other team who can then pull more tokens from the bag and try to guess the word. The card is passed back and forth between teams until the mystery word is found!

Be strategic, and ready to show your acting, drawing, and singing skills!

In Serena, you will be playing a young fox of good breeding in Venezia trying to win Serena’s heart.

However the task is not an easy one. Other contenders have come tonight with the same goal as you.

You will need to use deduction and logic to discover the identity of your competitors. At the bar or on the dance floor, don’t stop at anything to unsettle other suitors and win Serena’s eternal favours. Your love will be sealed with a waltz under the full moon’s intense glow.

each player carries out 1 and only 1
action before moving on to the player on his left, who then becomes the active player, and so on until
one player wins the game.

When it’s his turn to play, a player may carry out:
- An action at the bar (3 types of action possible) which consists mainly of exchanging cards
- An action on the dance floor (3 types of action possible) which consists mainly in accusing other players
- An action on a gondola: winning the game.

The first player who discover Serena by deduction win the game.

-description from publisher

boardgame: New Techno War: Drone Swarm Extension
description:
This extension of NEW TECHNO WAR proposes to discover a technology whose research and development is ongoing.

This extension adds drones that will add combat and intelligence to theatres of operation.

Cannot be played without the basic box NEW TECHNO WAR.

boardgame: New Techno War: Delivery Drone Extension
description:
This extension of NEW TECHNO WAR proposes to discover a technology whose research and development is ongoing.

This extension makes it possible to add drones carrying equipment in theatres of operation.

Cannot be played without the basic box NEW TECHNO WAR.

boardgame: New Techno War: Intelligent Shipping Container
description:
This extension of NEW TECHNO WAR proposes to discover a technology whose research and development is ongoing.

This extension allows you to add unmanned containers to theatres of operation.

Cannot be played without the basic box NEW TECHNO WAR.

This extension of NEW TECHNO WAR proposes to discover a technology whose research and development is ongoing.

Add the unmanned vehicle in the battlefield.

Cannot be played without the basic box NEW TECHNO WAR.

boardgame: No Peace for Thirty Years! The German Wars of Religion 1618-1648
description:
In 1618, three men were tossed out of a window in Prague Castle in an act of protest against the catholic king of Bohemia, a defenestration beginning the Thirty Years’ War. Encompassing all of Germany and featuring soldiers and generals from all over Europe, the Thirty Years’ War was the last and greatest of the European Wars of Religion.

No Peace for Thirty Years is a two player stand alone game using the No Peace Without Spain system. It contains two scenarios, the Winter King scenario (from 1618 to 1629) and the Lion of the North scenario (from 1630 to 1648), as well as the full No Peace for Thirty Years scenario (from 1618 to 1648).

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable
family: Players: Wargames with Rules Supporting Only Two Players
Series: No Peace Without Spain (Compass Games)

description: A promo card for Maracaibo. It resembles and old "real" postcard which can be laid over the explorer's path, featuring new effects. For example, there are 4 new last spaces.

Chocolate, vanilla or berry frosting? Which one is the most delicious? And most importantly, which one will earn you victory?

Cupcake Draft is a fast-playing card drafting game, in which your goal is to bake different cupcakes for the picky customers.

Each game is divided into two phases - drafting and bidding.
 In the drafting phase players will draft different Cupcakes. Each of the cupcakes has different flavor levels which will help with certain customers.

In the bidding phase players use the Cupcakes which they drafted to bid for the customers which give victory points.

The player with the most victory points is the winner.

-description from publisher

boardgame: Kaiju Siege: Pop Culture Kaiju Pack
description:
Introducing a mini expansion pack which contains 6 kaiju mats for use with the base game, Kaiju Siege. 3 of the kaiju were drawn by a guest artist in a different style.

This is not a standalone game and requires the base game which is sold separately.

boardgame: Fall of the Mountain King (Kickstarter Edition)
description:
Fall of the Mountain King (Kickstarter Edition) is an EXCLUSIVE edition and will not be available at retail. It includes the following additional content and deluxe components:

- River of Fire Mini-Expansion
- Notorious Gnomes Mini-Expansion
- Copper-foiled box cover
- 125 Troll miniatures in 5 different player colours
- 25 Champion miniatures in 5 different player colours
- 30 Gnome miniatures
- 1 Swarm miniature
- Custom moulded GameTrayz inserts with individual player trays
- Warhammer miniature First Player marker
- 65 wooden Influence markers shaped like hands
- 5 wooden Supply barrels
- Shiny gold-foiled Elder cards
- Shiny silver-foiled Great Halls tokens
- Dual-layered Clan boards
- Custom wooden Gnome Wheel pawn with screen-printed "Evil eyes"
- Custom-printed wooden Troll Skull score markers
- 150 wooden custom-shaped Ancestry cubes

About the mini-expansions:

The River of Fire expansion is another Kickstarter exclusive.
"Desperate for a weapon to drive off the Gnomes, the Trolls have breached the volcanic crater at the mountain's heart, allowing burning lava to flow out.  As the game goes on, you'll try to divert the river of fire to overwhelm the Gnomes, confound your rivals, and draw strength from its intense power.  But be careful!  Too much heat can burn even the toughest Troll, and devastate unlucky Domains!"
- 22 Fireworker tokens
- 10 Volcano cards
- 25 Lava gems (acrylic)
- Rules booklet

Notorious Gnomes is another mini-expansion that comes with this edition.
"Each notorious gnome causes new headaches for you and offers big rewards for defeating them as well."
- 12 Notorious Gnome cards
- 8 Problem cards
- 12 Notorious Gnome tokens

boardgame: Architects of the West Kingdom: Principi Promo Card
description:
Promo card for the base game originally given out at Modena Play in May 2022.

Ability: When you place a worker in the workshop, draw 2 cards and then discard 2 cards.
family: Series: The West Kingdom Trilogy (Garphill Games)

description:
Shiranui is a trick-taking game where you hand out 8 cards from 5 types of cards with numbers from 0 to 7.

The person who puts out the card with the lowest number will be the winner and earn points.

But then, the person who is given a card with a low number will be an advantageous luck game.

In Shiranui, you can increase the number of the opponent's card by using the tokens distributed.

Are you going to use the given tokens to get in the way of the other party...

Do you use it to increase your points...

It is a troublesome game where the timing and usage of using tokens affect the victory or defeat.

Robots vs. Dinosaurs is a turn-based action card game where players must battle for their survival before a massive asteroid impacts the planet.

The Story: Millions of years ago...
A dinosaur shaman has discovered an incoming Asteroid that will create havoc when it impacts in 5-7 days. There is a sacred cave in the great valley that can protect them. If they can get there before the impact, they’ll survive. Meanwhile, having escaped their imploding home planet, a group of robots have landed on the planet to make a new home. The robots have built shield generators to protect themselves, but their site is right in front of the sacred cave.

In this game, robots are trying to keep their shield generators operational to win the game and dinosaurs are trying to destroy the shield generators to get to the sacred cave to win.  There is a deck of 7 day cards which act as a countdown clock for the game.  Each day is a round where all players get a turn.  The Asteroid day is the last day of the game and is shuffled in a way where you don’t know if the game will end on day 5, 6 or 7.

Players Divide into two teams: Robots and Dinosaurs.  Each team has a deck of fighters, bonus and robot equipment cards.  The speed of your fighters will determine the turn order of each day where players will battle each other's fighters and try to break or fix the shield generators.

-description from publisher

Grandma has returned from her rock tour and wants to show her grandchildren her delicious recipes. The grandchildren, four wonderful young people, endowed with unique abilities, have let the family ties that unite them vanish.

The Grandmother will try by all means that they return to share the old time love You must assume the role of one of the grandchildren and collaborate with the others to achieve a common goal.

Will they be able to fulfill Grandmother's legacy? Players start with a sum of money that must circulate around the supermarket to buy the products of Grandma's recipe. They must collaborate with each other to give the products to Grandma and thus win the game.

If any player cannot pay what is indicated on the board, the others will help him pay. In the event that a player runs out of money, they continue to play and their expenses are assumed by the other players.

If among all the players they cannot pay what is indicated on the board, they will lose the game.


La Abuela ha regresado de su gira rockera y quiere enseñar a sus nietos sus riquísimas recetas. Los nietos, cuatro jóvenes maravillosos, dotados de habilidades únicas, han dejado desvanecer los lazos familiares que los unen. La Abuela tratará por todos los medios que vuelvan a compartir el cariño de antaño.

Deberás asumir el rol de uno de los nietos y colaborar con los demás para lograr un objetivo común, ¿podrán cumplir con el legado de la Abuela?

Los jugadores comienzan con una suma de dinero debiendo circular por el supermercado para comprar los productos de la receta de la Abuela. Deben colaborar entre sí para darle los productos a la Abuela y de este modo ganar la partida.

Si algún jugador no puede pagar lo indicado en el tablero, los demás le ayudarán a pagar. En el supuesto de que algún jugador se quedara sin dinero, siguen jugando y sus gastos son asumidos por los demás jugadores.

Si entre todos los jugadores no pueden pagar lo indicado en el tablero, perderán la partida.

boardgame: Valda: Companions – Kickstarter Exclusive Mini Expansion
description: This Kickstarter exclusive expansion gives you the chance to discover powerful Companions that follow you through your play. This expansion includes 15 new cards for the divine deck.

The base game is a book and set of punch-out tokens that combine with ANY miniatures or grid maps you have from ANY game.

The modular system is designed for cooperative play with a large group of friends while being both budget friendly and allowing one to use some favorite game pieces that were either in storage or just never meant for gaming.

For instance you can play with Warhammer 40k, Dungeons & Dragons, and Star Wars mini figs all in the same game on a Heroclix map. The combinations are endless and easily supported by an easy to use system.

The game even supports basic play without any miniatures or maps in your collection.

Players choose teams from various classes and play games in either a cooperative or head-to-head fashion. Players can choose; Deathmatch, Capture the Flag, Crusade, or Survival Mode.

In "Crusade" mode players occupy bases around a map over the course of several rounds. In Survival Mode players cooperatively fight against waves of AI generated and operated themed opponents such as zombies, or aliens, or the dreaded escaped zoo animals.

Bottom Line is this is a fun board game with endless replicability and options.

Play on a beautiful nature themed game board featuring vibrant watercolor work of famous lover and observer of birds John James Audubon. Learn fun facts about key species the National Audubon Society works tirelessly to protect. Collect the most bird sightings to win!

Includes: Game Board, 6 Collectible Metal Tokens, 22 Audubon Bird Property Cards, 4 Seasons Cards, 2 Gear Cards, 16 Field Guide Cards, 16 Birder's Journal Cards, 1 Pack of Custom Money, 32 Plastic Egg markers, 12 Plastic Nest markers, 2 Dice, and Rules.

Property cards have trivia about birds on the back; Six metal playing pieces include Bins (Binoculars), Duck, Hummingbird, Heron, Owl, Eagle.

We have learned how useful bees and their honey can be. But now, some hornets have settled nearby. And they seem to be anything but friendly.

This module can only be played together with Paleo. If you combine it with easy modules, the hornets are no big threat. Combined with harder modules, they can push you to your limits.

This game came with a TI-400 5-function calculator.

Setup: give each player a checkout counter (board) and $23. Each board has spaces for 4 servings each of Fruit & Vegetables, Bread & Cereal, and Dairy, and 2 spaces each for Meat and Bonus items. On turn, spin the spinner then draw a card from the food group matching the color spun and decide if you want to buy it. If you don’t buy it, return it to the bottom of the deck. If you buy it, draw a Pot Luck card and pay the price for the item as det by the item card and Pot Luck card then discard the Pot Luck card and place the item on its matching space on your checkout counter. If all such spaces are filled, you may place the card on a Bonus Item space or hold it to trade or sell. In lieu of drawing a card, you may use your turn to sell or trade a food card to another player for food or money. If a player makes an incorrect challenge, any other player may challenge them. The person who was wrong (the player or the challenger) must pay the bank the correct amount without receiving a card. Game ends when a player fills their checkout counter entirely. That player gets a 100-point bonus. Players then score 25 points for each item on their counter and 1 point for each penny not spent. High score wins. As a variant, deal each P a People card at the start of the game. Each card shows a calorie target. During scoring, subtract one point for each calorie above or below the target.

Bucket Race is a brand-new strategy and tabletop game where players race to see who can complete their bucket lists first!  The first edition is a map of the United States.

We welcome fellow explorers, dreamers, trailblazers, curiosity-seekers and casual bucket-listers of every kind to the Bucket Race!

The game consists of the following phases:

1. Setting up the game:
 - Game setup
 - Player setup
 - Choose a Home Destination

2. Game flow:
 - First Turn, Every Turn
 - Additional Actions
 - Ending the Game

The board has the following components:  
 - Game board (map of US with 5 distinct region with 1 reward lounge each, 45 destinations with a # between 2-12, spaces for 2 supplies that are randomized at the game's onset)
 - Game pieces: 2 dice, 5 player pieces, 52 deck of Surprise! Cards, 52 deck of Upgrade Cards, 5 wet erase markers, 90 supplies, 5 reward lounge tokens, Money
 - Rules booklet
 - 18 Persona Cards/Bucket Lists - the heart of the game is selecting a Persona Card/Bucket List which is the character you will take on and have to complete their bucket list the fastest in order to win.

Game flow: 
Each turn players first collect $100, then roll the dice to see if they can collect additional money (many ways through dice rolls, Surprise! Cards, also if roll doubles get an additional $100!).  Then they use money to pay to move their game piece, collect and manage supplies, check-off bucket list items, visit rewards lounges for additional upgrade cards, redeem upgrade cards if in possession, or trade and sell supplies to other players.

The first player to check-off all Bucket List items on their Persona Card and travel back to their “Home” destination, wins the Bucket Race!

This is a game where it is best to collaborate early on (trade supplies, help each other out), but then the last stretch it is truly a race to see who can win first!

Additionally, the bucket list items are based on real-life bucket lists, so we like to think this is a learning and travel game as well!  It is perfect for those that love competitive, strategy board games with travel and culture.

3-5 players or can play in teams.  There are 3 versions (Easy Tenderfoot, Medium Trailblazer, Advanced Globetrotter).  We recommend starting with Easy first to get the hang of the game.  Usually takes between 50-75 minutes to play, although for experienced gamers you could complete in 30-45 minutes if do a speed round.

-description from publisher

In Furrow Fields, 2-4 players take on the role of farmers competing to earn the most points and win the Harvest Festival’s Grand Champion title. Points are earned by successfully growing and harvesting crops from your field and completing as many villager commissions as you can before the festival begins at the end of the 14th round. Each round consists of a day phase and a night phase.

Each round a different player begins the day by choosing two seeds from a dwindling selection (and thereby limiting the options for others), harvesting grown crops from their field, and deciding whether to spend points on or use farm tools. Once done tending to their field, they then either turn in a completed commission, take on a new one (before another player takes it), or spend the rest of the day exploring the village. The next player then starts their day phase, until everyone has completed their day and night falls. At night, as crops grow closer to harvest, a variety of events may take place ranging from a visit by the hungry local wildlife to a useful item finding its way into a field.

-description from publisher

The game simulates the military engagements that took place in September, 1939, between Polish and German forces in the area near the towns of Ciechanów and Przasnysz (north of Warsaw, near the border with what was then German East Prussia).

The game was included in Taktyka i Strategia magazine no. 44. It consists of 1 map and 3 scenarios. It uses the WB–95 wargaming system developed by Taktyka i Strategia.

boardgame: The Artemis Project: Trial By Ice Promo Card
description:
Part of Tantrum House Season 8 Kickstarter Promo
Sometimes you find more than you set out looking for, when you brave an expedition into the frozen heart of Europa. Sometimes, you find a leader.

If you sent a colonist on an expedition and won first place, you may discard one Expedition badge and exchange that colonist for a Commander.

"Arkanolodzy" is a cooperative card game for 2-4 players.

This game uses 22 major arcana tarot cards.

Players take turns playing cards one at a time, aiming to play all the cards.

Each card has unique abilities which may sometimes help or interfere the players.

If all players successfully play all cards, all players win.

However, if any player is unable to play a card on their turn, all players immediately lose.

-description from designer
New cards, the same black humor as always. 50 new cards to add to the H.D.P.: Hasta Donde Puedas collection you have at home.

How about some more heroes? With more heroes you can get a lot of variety out of your games. You can also play them in solo (either as or against them) and even play 3-4P team games.

Pavl is a vicious snowman who commands the ice and snow to attack. This is the fourth additional hero for Battlecrest and the first to be designed by a guest designer, Mike Berg.

Components:

     Pavl Hero set.
     Pavl AI Sheet: for solo play, requires Imperator expansion.



What is the mark of a true champion? Legendary heroes clash across the Neververse to find out.

Battlecrest is a card-based tactical skirmish game for 2 players (1-4 with expansions). With perfect information, players must truly outwit their opponent to win.

Characters are composed of 6-card sets featuring a hero card, a health tracker, and action cards. Occasionally a minion or item will replace an action card.

The map is built of 6 cards as well, with the cards randomly placed in a set pattern.

Players take turns maneuvering their characters around the dynamic, and often dangerous map while unleashing powerful attacks. As action cards are used they open up new possibilities and empower the character’s battlecrests. Build up to decisive strikes or refocus to get powers back. Every character has a unique set of actions and preferred tactics, so no two battles play the same.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Fortress of Terror: Mines of Darkness
description:
The great kingdom of the dwarves lay hidden under the mountain for centuries, producing items of the finest craftsmanship. Suddenly, all within the mountain grew quiet. What has happened to the dwarves and their proud kingdom?

Mines of Darkness is the sixth Fantasy Adventure Module in the Roll-With-It system, a modular, solitaire roll-and-write adventure game system with endless possibilities for adventure through an accomplish-the-task-and-escape-the-maze-style gameplay.

Gameplay is centered around a maze or map, through which the player must navigate, accomplish some objective(s), and escape the map under pressure from the enemy's attacks via the Doom die. The simple, puzzley, maze-style gameplay is approached differently in each adventure, building on the basic rules with new rules, concepts, and components that make each adventure feel fresh and unique.

-description from designer

Welcome to SEEDS! Players take the role of rival Ohio farmers and compete to become the most prolific “seeder” in the midwest!
SEEDS is an exciting set collecting card game with a twist of “push your luck” and a unique scoring system. Players will plant seeds from their hands into fields accessible to all players in an attempt to harvest said fields at just the right moment. Wait too long and someone else might reap what you have sown. Harvest too soon and you will fall behind in points. When harvesting players add matching cards from their hand to the cards that were harvested and score points.(cards in hand x cards harvested = total points)

—description from the designer

If word games are your passion, then "Alfa Bēta Ducis" will be a new and exciting experience in the world of language games.

In the introduction to the game rules it says: "Playing this game gives players of all ages the opportunity to create shorter or longer words, and for those who are proficient in the Latvian language to prove their mastery! The game table is a bustle like a fairground: with words bought at a premium or cleverly constructed, fearless gambles, points gained and opportunities lost."

The aim of the game: To score the most points by building words from the letters on the 12 dice.

Game contents:
- 12 wooden dice with the letters of the Latvian alphabet on each side. Each letter has its own value: points (1, 2, 3, 5, 7) or stars (1 or 2).
- 16 wooden tokens, each worth 1 star.
- 1 turn leader card and 3 sequence cards.
Playing area
- Inside the game box is the playing area. The dice are rolled and the words are put together.
- Scorepad

Two thousand years before the events of Roll Player Adventures, war is on the horizon.  Embark on a heroic journey as you join the Heroes Guild, leading you on an epic adventure deep into Ulos's past! Make allies and enemies, lend your unique skills to unraveling the crafter’s mystery, and decide the fate of Ulos. Who will gain the upper hand in the upcoming great war?

Roll Player Adventures: Gulpax’s Secret is an all-new campaign for the co-operative storybook board game for 1-4 players. Players take on the role of fantasy heroes in seven new adventures, facing new challenges, exploring new environments, meeting new characters in the World of Ulos, and making meaningful decisions that change the story along the way.

This expansion also introduces a new element to enrich your story: Professions! Explore new possibilities that offer each player a unique storyline and upgradeable abilities.

Gulpax’s Secret requires the Roll Player Adventures base game to play. Set off on a journey of peril and discovery with your hero! Pick from one of eighteen pre-generated characters provided, or a host of additional options from the thirty-six pre-generated characters in Roll Player Adventures base game. Or, play as any completed character from the hit game, Roll Player!

-description from publisher

The party game where legends are born. Glory Trials is a highly-interactive team-based card game where you will compete in group challenges and complete individual secret missions in order to be victorious! The Glory Trials are an assortment of mini-games that have each been designed to test your abilities in different and interesting ways.

Throughout the game, players will also collect Secret Cards. These cards are kept confidential until played, and will describe a secret objective or a hidden ability.

The game is incredibly easy to learn! To setup, the 3 Trials (Mind, Body, and Spirit) must be separated into individual decks and placed in front of all players. Players then sit in a circle where every second person is on the same team.

To begin play, teams alternate taking turns going around the circle. At the beginning of a players turn, they draw a card from any deck and follow its instructions. The first team to win 3 challenge cards from each of the Mind, Body, and Spirit Trials wins the game!

-description from publisher

boardgame: Harrow County: The Fair Folk Expansion
description:
Why stop at 3 players when 4 players can play together? The Fair Folk expansion allows a player to play as the third or fourth player in any game, or as the second player against Hester.

The Fair Folk are minding their own business when someone kidnapped their queen as well as her crown and sword. The other players know where they are, but you do not.

You have to locate them during the battles that are going on above ground. To make matters worse, you're not able to do anything on your own due to ancient Fairy rules. Instead you need to make bargains and deals with other players to help you locate the queen and her stolen items.

How they play

The Fair Folk take smaller turns after each of the 2 factions take a turn. They place a Fairy nest along with an offer in that nest on any hex on the map.

If a player takes the offer and if the Fair Folk have enough silver cubes come out of the tree, the nest stays and the other players are forced to give information about the queen's sword, crown, or the location of the queen herself.

If the Fair Folk find their queen, then they win. It's possible that 2 players can win when the Fair Folk are playing. One of the factions could get to 7 points during the same round when the Fair Folk find their queen!

boardgame: The Pioneers of Utopia: Yozakura Kyōsōkyoku
description:
The next stage is night! A richer gaming experience!
The first expansion set of the popular series "Momoiro Dim Sum Girl"!

An expansion set for the popular series "Pink Dim Sum Girl" is now available!
An expansion set packed with elements for advanced users who are not satisfied with the basic set while keeping the fun of "Momoiro Dim Sum Girl"!
You can play with any combination of three expansion elements that can be freely combined.

◆ Expansion 1: Gensokyo at night
The centerpiece of this expansion set!
The game board has been changed to a night specification and the difficulty level has been increased!
Players also acquire various new powers and challenge the development of Togenkyo!

◆ Expansion 2: New Alchemist
Two new characters have appeared!
Overwhelm other players with tricky abilities!

◆ Extension 3: New technique
The number of ways to obtain the important “peaches” in this game has increased!
The range of strategies has greatly increased!

●Adjustment variant

     A character card for adjusting the balance of the basic set is included.


【Please be careful! ]
The separately sold "Pink Dim Sum Girl Basic Set" is required to play.
This pdf book consists of 10 quests for The Snake Island Oracle campaign. These quests are made for the board game Dungeon Universalis.

boardgame: 日本本土防空戦 (Nippon Hondo Bōkūsen)
description:
“The war situation is the worst. It's impossible to win anymore, but it makes sense to fight for as long as possible.  It is impossible for Japan to allocate enough air forces indispensable for mainland air defense to each division.  Each division commander should strive to minimize the damage to his army.  From today, please become the division commander and take command.

It is now clear that there will be a lot of damage.

Execute the operation with a limited force and prepare for a long-term battle."

日本本土防空戦 (Nippon Hondo Bōkūsen) is a may-follow trick-taking game where the suits are visible on the rear of the cards. There are four suits and they are not evenly distributed (e.g. there are 7 red cards, but 18 green cards.) The less common suits are higher in strength than the more frequent ones.

Players will earn points if they do not win a trick, but the winner of the game will be the player with the fewest points.

In the second hand, the cards are dealt face down and the player with the most points can look at the backs of the cards and choose which hand they want to play.

The person with the fewest points after an agreed upon number of rounds wins.

Huck + Monster is a field-to-table Ultimate Pickup game that condenses the action and gameplay of Ultimate into a travel-sized, sideline-ready, turn-based gamekit.

Ideal for Ultimate players and enthusiasts of any skill level, the Huck + Monster gamekit includes everything new Coaches need to train their next Ultimate team dynasty.


Gameplay Overview:

Handler rolls for throw distance. Adjacent defense rolls to challenge throw, disc path, or catch. Offense only rolls again for continues, or challenge catches. Highest roll count wins the challenge, and controls the disc. Catch discs in the opponent’s endzone to score.

---

Game Steps:

1. Add 7 players to each line. Add the offensive disc to the last open defensive line space.
2. Defense rolls 3 to throw. Disc moves roll total.
3. Teams roll 3 to move. Offense moves first. 
4. Roll total may be split across players. Players and discs cannot move over occupied spaces.
5. Roll 3 to throw, or catch; 3 to mark, or block.
6. Roll 1 when continuing; 2 when intercepting.
7. Roll strategy dice once per throw.
8. Score by catching disc from the endzone.
9. Game plays to 7 points; win by two.


      Certain pickup kits may include spinning pins,  


which replace “roll” instructions above.

A box full of surprises, three exciting time travel adventures and a unique combination of quiz questions and escape feeling - that's QUIZscape! The game box is a time machine with which the players must complete three adventures. The novel game concept by Arno Steinwender alternates various puzzles with quiz questions: Wrong answers increase the time pressure! And the game is full of surprises. The title translates to "The Time Travel Agents".

The first stop on the journey through time takes the players to 18th century France. The famous writer Jules Verne is on the brink of making a huge mistake - can the players stop him in time?

The second adventure takes the players right into the legendary Aztec Empire where a group of illegal time-travel-tourists causes chaos.

In the third adventure, the players find themselves in the middle of the Roaring 20s.

The game is suitable for beginners and offers a quick start. veryone can start puzzling right away in just a few steps.

How to play:
The players play together through 3 different adventures. In the process, they have to answer quiz questions and solve puzzles. Additional clues and secret messages are hidden in the box. But be careful: time is running out, and time is deducted for each incorrectly answered quiz question.
Can the players find the clues and solve the questions and puzzles?

A Black Stories edition with creepy stories about human abysses.

Black Stories are tricky, morbid, sinister riddle stories. The players try to reconstruct the particulars of each incident, piece by piece, by asking yes-or-no-questions.

boardgame: The Belligerent: Glory to the Heroes
description:
The Belligerent: Glory to the Heroes is a turn-based modern warfare strategy game about the Russian invasion of Ukraine.

The game is about the Convoy Attack, one of the war's key points, and the effort to stop and destroy the invading Russian convoy approaching the capital from the main highway running from Chernobyl to Kyiv.

In a two-player game, one of the players manages the Russian side and the other the Ukraine side; In four-player gameplay, each player manages one power deck of their country. Both countries have one army and one civilian power deck. Each deck contains intelligence and attack cards, and a Joker card. Each side has a power deck as well as an event card drawn at the beginning of each round, independently of the sides. In the game, which is based on turn-based gameplay, after a series of successive preparation phases, the skirmish phase comes. In the preparation phase, the sides manage their hands; draw a card, change or lay -there is also the mechanic of advancing the convoy of the Russian side-. When it comes to the skirmish round, the dice are rolled by calculating the combos and advantages of the drawn cards: depending on the result, either the Russian convoy was stopped or damaged, or the Ukrainian side's attempts were unsuccessful.

If the convoy reaches Kyiv by capturing the cities on its way, one after the other, until the end of the grand tour, and thereby capturing the capital, it will be successful. On the other hand, if the Ukrainian side neutralizes the invasion attempt by slowing down the convoy or destroying all of them one by one, they win.

Prepare your strategy, follow your opponent closely and wish you luck. Be brave or cautious; The fate of the war is in your hands.

—description from the designer

description:
Join Bluey and her family in a fun game of Hopscotch with Bluey's Hopscotch Race Card Game. Build a Hopscotch path using the cards, then spin the spinner to match the color and be the first to the finish line!

includes 44 colorful picture cards, a color spinner and 4 character movers depicting Bluey's family members.

In the mystical lands of the Himalayas, two ancient tribes compete for resources and divine favour... 

Tibetana is a two-player strategy game designed to be easily accessible and deeply strategic, with an infinite replay value. Thrilling 30-minute duels you’ll want to relive again and again!

A collector’s game crafted as a work of art that includes:

     24 detailed player miniatures
     19 hex territories for a modular board
     17 acrylic pagodas, portals and demon standees
     Over 100 premium components, including a custom die, tokens, tarot-sized cards, and energy crystals



				
				
					How to PlayIn Tibetana, your goal is to complete three pagodas before your opponent does. Control the map with your guardians and extract energy with your priestesses, expanding your influence through new settlements.

On your turn, you can perform up to three actions: Move your pieces, Train new ones, Build pagodas, Expel demons or even Regenerate magic portals.

Your presence will disturb the ancient demons that live in those territories. There are five of them, each wielding unique effects that may enhance or disrupt your plans. As the game advances, they grow increasingly powerful. Sometimes, even explosive!

				
				
					The MythsTibetana’s aesthetics and mechanics are inspired by the spiritual traditions of the Himalayas and Central Asia, with roots deeply grounded in Tibetan Buddhism.

Who will win this Halloween, a horde of candy-chasing kids or one kid-chasing ghost? Find out in Flick or Treat, a quick and colorful micro-dexterity game designed by Julio E. Nazario! Featuring custom 3D-printed pieces, a fun flick-and-roll mechanic, and a way to play using actual pieces of candy, this game just might become one of your new Halloween traditions.

Flick or Treat takes around 15 minutes for 2-5 players to enjoy. One player will be the ghost, whose sole objective is to capture all of the kids. All other players play cooperatively as the kids, racing as a team to collect all of the candy before the ghost can grab them!

On their turn, each player will move their piece by pushing them with the Hallowheel. When they make contact with their target object (kid or candy) without falling over, they capture it! If the kids collect all the candy, they win! But if the ghost can capture all the kids first, the ghost wins!

-description from publisher

description: Promo card featuring Lizzy Funkhouser of Board Game Spotlight.  The power is called "Just Liz-Tening" and is +7 attack (if you have not talked this round yet), or +1 movement and +3 attack.

What Does 4 Cultures Bring to the Basic Game?
Components:
4 characters for each Culture and specific skills. Choose to play as the Merchant (Arab culture), skill with jewels; Master of the stamps (European culture), skill with stamps and portals; Shaman (indigenous culture, skill with the spell and Guardian of the light Asian culture), skill with candles.

New events that you add to the base game deck, activate the camp and discover the cultural treasures, trade with the camel caravan, book your mission from the Oasis and join the wisdom of the children to rearrange the treasure deck as you suits you

4 culture boards, 7 new quests, 8 treasure cards, 4 culture tokens, 5 portal-seal tokens and 1 culture medallion.

Objective of the game:
As in Dry Bones, the objective of the game is to revive the dry bones that are scattered in the Thar desert, in the golden triangle of Rajasthan, India. The one with the most points will be the winner. How do you get the points? through completing the missions and the new way that brings 4 cultures to score, through the collection sets of cultural treasures.

Learn to play the basic game Dry Bones, Spin the seals, open the portals and conjure the spirit of the 4 winds. Add this expansion and experience the thrill of the journey.

Join this new adventure through the Thar desert, Rajastan! Will these bones be able to revive?

description:
Grandfather is a children's game in which we have to get the highest number of points trying to complete the skeleton of our character. Created to learn the human skeleton on the one hand, its reversible board in the form of 4 puzzle pieces allows learning the parts of the body on the other. We continue singing and dancing with our Grandfather and the song.

In El Abuelo, it follows the rules for placing the tiles as in the basic game My Bag of Bones, but with some peculiarities. We tell you.

That contribute?
-For the player who plays with THE GRANDFATHER
Desert Tiles allow you to steal any tile from another player's bag but with your eyes closed. You can take 2 from the stack. They do not have to be consecutive. It's up to you. Take a good look at what the other players are discarding in their bag on the board
Grandpa introduces changes for the other players. Specifically, when they extract a tile from the grandfather and another from a foreign character. They go to their respective characters, without losing turn.

With the Color Bags variant, we will steal a tile belonging to the player's bag of that color. In setup, they are exchanged for four desert tiles.

In the Multicolor Sachets variant, we substitute three desert tiles. Grandpa must be present. We choose two players to steal a tile from each one's bag. We can combine the two variants by substituting seven desert tiles.

The multicolored puff removes a puff from the board of a player of our choice. The character ones are only used when the grandfather is in the game.

Every time we have to place a breath and we don't have it, we take our character's. Only Grandpa has one for himself.

The winner will be the one with the most points. Grandpa adds one point for every two puffs in his pool.

description:
Maltfriend's Journey is a roll-and-move game in which the players compete to build the most succesful whisky empire in Victorian Scotland (late 19th century). Players travel cross country along historical steam carriage, railway and ship routes to visit landmarks and famous destillery sites.

During the game players will need to gain enough licenses to start destilleries and gather resources to do so. While travelling the country, players can choose between the short routes where they risk paying a fee to their competitors, or the longer, scenic routes, which may cost them valuable time.

While Maltfriend's Journey is not a drinking game, it is a game with a mature theme, rich on history and information about historical Scotland.

boardgame: Star Wars: X-Wing (Second Edition) – Siege of Coruscant Battle Pack
description:
Players relive a pivotal battle in the Star Wars saga with this new Scenario Pack for Star Wars: X-Wing! Siege of Coruscant puts players on both sides of this monumental battle, with one player commanding the Republic forces desperately trying to rescue Supreme Chancellor Palpatine from the clutches of the Separatists and the other player attempting to stop them. With 23 ship cards featuring a standard loadout combining pilots and upgrades, this pack gives players everything they need to create their own custom squads and play out this thrilling scenario!

-description from the publisher's website
family: Game: Star Wars X-Wing Miniatures Game

description:
Contame: Terror (Tell me: Horror) is a narrative game, in which a player draws a card from deck "Histories". Then, he chooses one from deck "Actions" and five from deck "Draws". He must create a story using elements from all the cards, that includes a number of points awarded to the story-teller by the other players if he uses them correctly. With fearsome characters, chilling settings, very scary objects and special effects to create and tell the best horror stories.

After everybody has been the story-teller, the person with more points is the winner.


Before starting, you have to divide the deck into four groups: «Characters», «Scenarios», «Animals + Objects» and «Special Effects». Then each deck is shuffled well and placed face down on the table. The objective will be to tell a horror story. We suggest three ways to play.

4 game modes:

Timeline (2 to 4 participants)

Distribute 4 anniversaries to each player, placing them on the side of the illustration. Then leave an ephemeris in the center of the table with the date in sight. This last card will be the starting point of the timeline. In turns, each one must place one of their cards to the left or to the right of the initial event, depending on whether it happened before or after. Once located, it will turn you over. If he did it correctly, he will leave her in the timeline. If he did not guess correctly, the ephemeris is discarded and the player must take a new card from the remaining deck. This dynamic will be repeated with the rest of the participants. Whoever first manages to place all their cards on the timeline will win. The challenge will appear when cards are added, since there will be more options to decide.

Secret Ephemeris
Take a random ephemeris card, to discover what different people did, in different parts of the world and at different times. Do it any day of the year and at any time. Then, take out a card of questions, which will question us about issues of the anniversary that were not counted. The question may be answered orally or in writing, but yes or yes, it will have to be done creatively.

Ephemeris on Demand

Read ephemeris to inspire your own actions. This haphazard reading can also give us clues or hints of hope in times of uncertainty. It can invite us to reflect or help us solve dilemmas, as if it were an oracle.

An Ephemeris is Born

Make two lists: one of professions, jobs or hobbies (eg architect, teacher). Another with qualifying adjectives (eg: fast, insistent) The more original, the better! Then cross elements from both categories (randomly or by choice) and thus create a fantastic binomial (Gianni Rodari, 1973) such as: “Insistent Architect”. Name the new character, place it in a city in the world and assign a date. Imagine a short story: tell something that happened to him or tell what he was doing that day. They can also be inspired by the questions on the cards. You just have to get carried away by the fantastic combination of words!

boardgame: Close Quarter Battle: Miniature Combat Field Manual
description:
Close Quarter Battle (CQB) is a fast-paced miniatures game that follows the action of small Fireteams against enemy insurgents. Strike squads are made up of highly trained operatives who are sent on clandestine missions to disrupt the enemy.

Games are played between two opposing players. One player controls the insurgents and the other controls the operatives. Players are encouraged to play through each campaign as one side and then switch sides to play the campaign again. A campaign of CQB tells a story as it follows the operatives from mission to mission.

The Rules
Quick-to-learn rules, presented as core rules and advanced rules, ensure you will get your models onto the battlefield as quickly as possible. Core rules are easily remembered while advanced rules can be referred to as needed.

The presentation of the Close Quarter Battle – War on Drugs rulebook focuses on the Drug Wars, but you can easily adapt these rules to any modern conflict.

description:
Can you imagine combining great games like Pictionary and Say it with Mime in an original dynamic? Well, here we are for you to try this super fun game for groups and meetings. Guaranteed laughs (we laugh every time we try the prototype).

A team game where 1 player must draw a word, another act what he sees in the drawing (without seeing the word) and the rest guess what the word is (without seeing the drawing or the word).

ALL IN 90 SECONDS.

Ideal game to play with the family. Guaranteed laughs.


HOW TO PLAY?

Juan takes out a word card. He chooses and he has to draw the word he chose.

Juan shows the drawing to Pedro (ONLY HIM), who can only act out what he sees in the drawing (without seeing the word card).

Laura watches Pedro acting and has to guess what word he is.

Can they do it in 45 seconds?

You earn more points if you choose the most difficult word… there are three categories.
Roll the die, answer questions and escape the volcano by jumping from one rock to the other. Beware dinosaurs that can make you move backwards.
Players try to score the most points by using the letter cards in their hand to spell new words and/or by splicing (inserting) letter cards into words previously played to form new words.
